{"parentUuid":"3e8951c1-e87e-4bd0-9ffc-4fcfad7a3b7d","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_bdrk_01NtgCGdE1PuJkwGYYpEZz4m","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_bdrk_013XEjDPQexW5dBySK19cm6m","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm/slides_part_a.html","content":"<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"zh-CN\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n  <title>自我提升与自我进化算法 - Part A</title>\n  <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com\">\n  <link href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Noto+Sans+SC:wght@300;400;500;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap\" rel=\"stylesheet\">\n  <style>\n    /* ============================================================\n       CSS Variables & Reset\n       ============================================================ */\n    :root {\n      --bg-primary: #0a0f1e;\n      --bg-secondary: #111827;\n      --bg-card: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);\n      --bg-card-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n      --text-primary: #f1f5f9;\n      --text-secondary: #94a3b8;\n      --text-muted: #64748b;\n      --accent-orange: #f97316;\n      --accent-orange-glow: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.3);\n      --accent-cyan: #06b6d4;\n      --accent-cyan-glow: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.3);\n      --accent-green: #22c55e;\n      --accent-green-glow: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3);\n      --accent-purple: #a855f7;\n      --accent-red: #ef4444;\n      --border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n      --border-light: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);\n      --radius: 16px;\n      --radius-sm: 10px;\n      --shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n      --font-sans: 'Inter', 'Noto Sans SC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;\n      --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', Consolas, monospace;\n    }\n\n    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n    html, body {\n      width: 100%; height: 100%;\n      font-family: var(--font-sans);\n      background: var(--bg-primary);\n      color: var(--text-primary);\n      overflow: hidden;\n      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Slide Framework\n       ============================================================ */\n    .presentation {\n      width: 100%; height: 100%;\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    .slide {\n      position: absolute;\n      inset: 0;\n      display: flex;\n      flex-direction: column;\n      justify-content: center;\n      align-items: center;\n      padding: 50px 80px;\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateX(40px) scale(0.98);\n      transition: opacity 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),\n                  transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);\n      pointer-events: none;\n      z-index: 0;\n      background:\n        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.03) 0%, transparent 50%),\n        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 50%, rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.03) 0%, transparent 50%),\n        linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg-primary) 0%, #0d1525 100%);\n    }\n\n    .slide::before {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute; inset: 0;\n      background:\n        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px, transparent 1px),\n        linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px, transparent 1px);\n      background-size: 60px 60px;\n      pointer-events: none;\n    }\n\n    .slide.active {\n      opacity: 1;\n      transform: translateX(0) scale(1);\n      pointer-events: all;\n      z-index: 1;\n    }\n\n    .slide.exit-left {\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateX(-40px) scale(0.98);\n    }\n\n    .slide-content {\n      position: relative;\n      z-index: 1;\n      width: 100%;\n      max-width: 1100px;\n      text-align: center;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Fragments (step-by-step reveal within a slide)\n       ============================================================ */\n    .fragment {\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateY(20px);\n      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;\n    }\n\n    .fragment.visible {\n      opacity: 1;\n      transform: translateY(0);\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Typography\n       ============================================================ */\n    h1 {\n      font-size: clamp(42px, 5vw, 72px);\n      font-weight: 800;\n      line-height: 1.15;\n      letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n      margin-bottom: 16px;\n    }\n\n    h2 {\n      font-size: clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 48px);\n      font-weight: 700;\n      line-height: 1.25;\n      letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    h3 {\n      font-size: clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 32px);\n      font-weight: 600;\n      line-height: 1.3;\n      margin-bottom: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .subtitle {\n      font-size: clamp(18px, 2vw, 28px);\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      font-weight: 400;\n      line-height: 1.5;\n    }\n\n    .big-text {\n      font-size: clamp(32px, 4vw, 56px);\n      font-weight: 700;\n      line-height: 1.3;\n    }\n\n    .gradient-text {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-orange) 0%, var(--accent-cyan) 100%);\n      -webkit-background-clip: text;\n      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n      background-clip: text;\n    }\n\n    .gradient-text-reverse {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan) 0%, var(--accent-green) 100%);\n      -webkit-background-clip: text;\n      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n      background-clip: text;\n    }\n\n    .highlight-orange { color: var(--accent-orange); }\n    .highlight-cyan { color: var(--accent-cyan); }\n    .highlight-green { color: var(--accent-green); }\n    .highlight-purple { color: var(--accent-purple); }\n\n    .tag {\n      display: inline-block;\n      padding: 6px 18px;\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      font-weight: 500;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      margin-bottom: 24px;\n    }\n\n    .quote {\n      font-size: clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 30px);\n      font-style: italic;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-orange);\n      padding-left: 24px;\n      text-align: left;\n      max-width: 800px;\n      margin: 24px auto;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Cards & Containers\n       ============================================================ */\n    .glass-card {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 32px;\n      transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    }\n\n    .glass-card:hover {\n      background: var(--bg-card-hover);\n      border-color: var(--border-light);\n      transform: translateY(-2px);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    }\n\n    .grid-2 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 24px;\n      width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    .grid-3 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 24px;\n      width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    .grid-2x2 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n      grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 20px;\n      width: 100%;\n      max-width: 900px;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Cover Slide Specifics\n       ============================================================ */\n    #cover {\n      background:\n        radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%, rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),\n        radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),\n        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.05) 0%, transparent 60%),\n        linear-gradient(180deg, #080d1a 0%, #0f172a 100%);\n    }\n\n    #cover::before {\n      background:\n        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px),\n        linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px);\n      background-size: 80px 80px;\n    }\n\n    .cover-orbs {\n      position: absolute; inset: 0; overflow: hidden; pointer-events: none;\n    }\n\n    .cover-orbs .orb {\n      position: absolute;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      filter: blur(80px);\n      animation: float 8s ease-in-out infinite;\n    }\n\n    .cover-orbs .orb:nth-child(1) {\n      width: 400px; height: 400px;\n      background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.12);\n      top: -10%; left: 10%;\n      animation-delay: 0s;\n    }\n\n    .cover-orbs .orb:nth-child(2) {\n      width: 350px; height: 350px;\n      background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.12);\n      bottom: -10%; right: 10%;\n      animation-delay: -3s;\n    }\n\n    .cover-orbs .orb:nth-child(3) {\n      width: 250px; height: 250px;\n      background: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.08);\n      top: 40%; right: 30%;\n      animation-delay: -5s;\n    }\n\n    @keyframes float {\n      0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }\n      33% { transform: translate(20px, -20px) scale(1.05); }\n      66% { transform: translate(-15px, 15px) scale(0.95); }\n    }\n\n    .cover-meta {\n      display: flex;\n      gap: 32px;\n      justify-content: center;\n      margin-top: 40px;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n    }\n\n    .cover-meta span {\n      font-size: 15px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      font-weight: 400;\n    }\n\n    .cover-meta span::before {\n      content: '';\n      display: inline-block;\n      width: 6px; height: 6px;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      background: var(--accent-orange);\n      margin-right: 10px;\n      vertical-align: middle;\n    }\n\n    .cover-divider {\n      width: 80px; height: 3px;\n      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-orange), var(--accent-cyan));\n      border-radius: 2px;\n      margin: 32px auto;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Poll Slide\n       ============================================================ */\n    .poll-option {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 2px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 24px 28px;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      transition: all 0.3s ease;\n      text-align: left;\n      position: relative;\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .poll-option::before {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      inset: 0;\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-orange-glow), transparent);\n      opacity: 0;\n      transition: opacity 0.3s ease;\n    }\n\n    .poll-option:hover {\n      border-color: var(--accent-orange);\n      transform: translateY(-3px);\n      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.15);\n    }\n\n    .poll-option:hover::before { opacity: 1; }\n\n    .poll-option.selected {\n      border-color: var(--accent-orange);\n      background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.1);\n    }\n\n    .poll-option.correct {\n      border-color: var(--accent-green) !important;\n      background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1) !important;\n      box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2) !important;\n    }\n\n    .poll-option .letter {\n      position: relative;\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      width: 36px; height: 36px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\n      font-weight: 700;\n      font-size: 16px;\n      color: var(--accent-orange);\n      margin-right: 16px;\n      flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .poll-option .option-text {\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    .poll-option .option-main {\n      font-size: 20px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      display: block;\n      margin-bottom: 4px;\n    }\n\n    .poll-option .option-desc {\n      font-size: 14px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      font-weight: 400;\n    }\n\n    .poll-option .option-row {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Result Bar Chart\n       ============================================================ */\n    .result-section {\n      margin-top: 32px;\n      display: none;\n    }\n\n    .result-section.show { display: block; }\n\n    .result-bar-group {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      margin-bottom: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .result-label {\n      width: 80px;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .result-bar-track {\n      flex: 1;\n      height: 32px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);\n      border-radius: 8px;\n      overflow: hidden;\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    .result-bar-fill {\n      height: 100%;\n      border-radius: 8px;\n      width: 0;\n      transition: width 1s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      padding-left: 12px;\n      font-size: 13px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      color: white;\n    }\n\n    .result-bar-fill.bar-a { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6366f1, #818cf8); }\n    .result-bar-fill.bar-b { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #06b6d4, #22d3ee); }\n    .result-bar-fill.bar-c { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f97316, #fb923c); }\n    .result-bar-fill.bar-d { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #22c55e, #4ade80); }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Bottleneck / Pillar Cards\n       ============================================================ */\n    .pillar-card {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 36px 28px;\n      text-align: center;\n      position: relative;\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-card::after {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 3px;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-card:nth-child(1)::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-orange), #fbbf24); }\n    .pillar-card:nth-child(2)::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-cyan), #38bdf8); }\n    .pillar-card:nth-child(3)::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-red), #f87171); }\n\n    .pillar-icon {\n      font-size: 48px;\n      margin-bottom: 16px;\n      display: block;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-title {\n      font-size: 22px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      margin-bottom: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-desc {\n      font-size: 15px;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      line-height: 1.6;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-number {\n      font-size: 64px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      opacity: 0.06;\n      position: absolute;\n      bottom: -10px; right: 16px;\n      line-height: 1;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Bootstrap / Cycle Diagram\n       ============================================================ */\n    .cycle-container {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      gap: 20px;\n      margin: 32px auto;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n      max-width: 800px;\n    }\n\n    .cycle-node {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 2px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 20px 28px;\n      text-align: center;\n      min-width: 160px;\n      transition: all 0.4s ease;\n    }\n\n    .cycle-node.active-node {\n      border-color: var(--accent-orange);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--accent-orange-glow);\n    }\n\n    .cycle-arrow {\n      font-size: 28px;\n      color: var(--accent-orange);\n      animation: pulse-arrow 2s ease-in-out infinite;\n    }\n\n    @keyframes pulse-arrow {\n      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translateX(0); }\n      50% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(5px); }\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Stage / Analogy Cards\n       ============================================================ */\n    .stage-card {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 32px 24px;\n      text-align: center;\n      position: relative;\n      transition: all 0.4s ease;\n    }\n\n    .stage-card.stage-highlight {\n      border-color: var(--accent-orange);\n      background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.06);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 40px var(--accent-orange-glow);\n    }\n\n    .stage-number {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      width: 44px; height: 44px;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n      font-weight: 800;\n      font-size: 20px;\n      margin-bottom: 16px;\n    }\n\n    .stage-highlight .stage-number {\n      background: var(--accent-orange);\n      color: white;\n    }\n\n    .stage-emoji {\n      font-size: 48px;\n      display: block;\n      margin-bottom: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .stage-arrow {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      font-size: 28px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Panorama Map\n       ============================================================ */\n    .panorama-wrapper {\n      width: 100%;\n      max-width: 1000px;\n      margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .panorama-header {\n      text-align: center;\n      margin-bottom: 36px;\n    }\n\n    .panorama-branches {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 24px;\n    }\n\n    .panorama-branch {\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 28px 20px;\n      text-align: center;\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      position: relative;\n      overflow: hidden;\n      transition: all 0.4s ease;\n    }\n\n    .panorama-branch::before {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 4px;\n    }\n\n    .branch-orange { background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.04); }\n    .branch-orange::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f97316, #fbbf24); }\n    .branch-orange:hover { background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.08); border-color: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.3); }\n\n    .branch-cyan { background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.04); }\n    .branch-cyan::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #06b6d4, #38bdf8); }\n    .branch-cyan:hover { background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.08); border-color: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.3); }\n\n    .branch-green { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.04); }\n    .branch-green::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #22c55e, #4ade80); }\n    .branch-green:hover { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.08); border-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3); }\n\n    .branch-title {\n      font-size: 20px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      margin-bottom: 4px;\n    }\n\n    .branch-subtitle {\n      font-size: 13px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .branch-methods {\n      list-style: none;\n      text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .branch-methods li {\n      padding: 10px 14px;\n      margin-bottom: 8px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);\n      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);\n      font-size: 15px;\n      font-weight: 500;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      transition: all 0.2s ease;\n      cursor: default;\n    }\n\n    .branch-methods li:hover {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);\n    }\n\n    .method-dot {\n      width: 8px; height: 8px;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .branch-orange .method-dot { background: var(--accent-orange); }\n    .branch-cyan .method-dot { background: var(--accent-cyan); }\n    .branch-green .method-dot { background: var(--accent-green); }\n\n    .panorama-connector {\n      display: flex;\n      justify-content: center;\n      margin-bottom: 24px;\n    }\n\n    .connector-line {\n      width: 80%;\n      height: 2px;\n      background: linear-gradient(90deg,\n        var(--accent-orange),\n        var(--accent-cyan),\n        var(--accent-green));\n      border-radius: 1px;\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    .connector-line::before,\n    .connector-line::after,\n    .connector-line .mid-dot {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      top: 50%;\n      width: 10px; height: 10px;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      transform: translateY(-50%);\n    }\n\n    .connector-line::before {\n      left: 16.66%;\n      background: var(--accent-orange);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--accent-orange-glow);\n    }\n\n    .connector-line::after {\n      right: 16.66%;\n      background: var(--accent-green);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--accent-green-glow);\n    }\n\n    .connector-line .mid-dot {\n      left: 50%;\n      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);\n      background: var(--accent-cyan);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--accent-cyan-glow);\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Transition / Questions Slide\n       ============================================================ */\n    .question-list {\n      text-align: left;\n      max-width: 750px;\n      margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .question-item {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: flex-start;\n      gap: 16px;\n      padding: 20px 0;\n      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\n    }\n\n    .question-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n\n    .q-number {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      width: 36px; height: 36px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.15);\n      color: var(--accent-orange);\n      font-weight: 700;\n      font-size: 16px;\n      flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .q-text {\n      font-size: 22px;\n      font-weight: 500;\n      line-height: 1.5;\n      padding-top: 4px;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Navigation UI\n       ============================================================ */\n    .nav-bar {\n      position: fixed;\n      bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 48px;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      padding: 0 30px;\n      z-index: 100;\n      background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(10, 15, 30, 0.8));\n    }\n\n    .progress-track {\n      position: fixed;\n      bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 3px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\n      z-index: 101;\n    }\n\n    .progress-fill {\n      height: 100%;\n      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-orange), var(--accent-cyan));\n      transition: width 0.4s ease;\n      border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0;\n    }\n\n    .slide-counter {\n      font-size: 13px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      font-weight: 500;\n      font-family: var(--font-mono);\n    }\n\n    .nav-hint {\n      font-size: 12px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      opacity: 0.5;\n    }\n\n    .nav-hint kbd {\n      display: inline-block;\n      padding: 2px 8px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\n      border-radius: 4px;\n      font-family: var(--font-mono);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      margin: 0 2px;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Speaker Notes Overlay\n       ============================================================ */\n    .speaker-notes {\n      position: fixed;\n      bottom: 48px; left: 0; right: 0;\n      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);\n      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      padding: 16px 30px;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n      z-index: 99;\n      display: none;\n      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);\n      max-height: 120px;\n      overflow-y: auto;\n    }\n\n    .speaker-notes.show { display: block; }\n\n    .speaker-notes strong { color: var(--accent-orange); }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Action Button\n       ============================================================ */\n    .action-btn {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 8px;\n      padding: 12px 28px;\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-orange), #ea580c);\n      color: white;\n      border: none;\n      border-radius: 12px;\n      font-size: 16px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: var(--font-sans);\n      transition: all 0.3s ease;\n      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px var(--accent-orange-glow);\n    }\n\n    .action-btn:hover {\n      transform: translateY(-2px);\n      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px var(--accent-orange-glow);\n    }\n\n    .action-btn.secondary {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n      color: var(--text-primary);\n      box-shadow: none;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Callout Box\n       ============================================================ */\n    .callout {\n      background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.06);\n      border: 1px solid rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.2);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 24px 28px;\n      text-align: left;\n      max-width: 700px;\n      margin: 24px auto 0;\n    }\n\n    .callout-label {\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n      color: var(--accent-orange);\n      margin-bottom: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .callout p {\n      font-size: 17px;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Stagger Animations\n       ============================================================ */\n    .stagger > * {\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateY(20px);\n      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;\n    }\n\n    .slide.active .stagger > *,\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > * {\n      opacity: 1;\n      transform: translateY(0);\n    }\n\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.1s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.2s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.3s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 0.4s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(5) { transition-delay: 0.5s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(6) { transition-delay: 0.6s; }\n\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > *:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.1s; }\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > *:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.25s; }\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > *:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.4s; }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Misc & Responsive\n       ============================================================ */\n    .spacer-sm { height: 16px; }\n    .spacer-md { height: 28px; }\n    .spacer-lg { height: 40px; }\n\n    .text-center { text-align: center; }\n    .text-left { text-align: left; }\n    .mx-auto { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }\n\n    .fade-up-enter {\n      animation: fadeUpIn 0.6s ease forwards;\n    }\n\n    @keyframes fadeUpIn {\n      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }\n      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n    }\n\n    @keyframes fadeIn {\n      from { opacity: 0; }\n      to { opacity: 1; }\n    }\n\n    @keyframes scaleIn {\n      from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); }\n      to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }\n    }\n\n    @keyframes slideInRight {\n      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(40px); }\n      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }\n    }\n\n    /* Responsive for smaller screens */\n    @media (max-width: 900px) {\n      .slide { padding: 30px 24px; }\n      .grid-3, .panorama-branches { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n      .grid-2, .grid-2x2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n      .cover-meta { flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }\n    }\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class=\"presentation\">\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 0: Cover\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide active\" id=\"cover\"\n         data-notes=\"30s - 简短开场，微笑，扫视全场，不要急着开讲。'大家好，我们组的主题是自我提升与自我进化算法。'\">\n      <div class=\"cover-orbs\">\n        <div class=\"orb\"></div>\n        <div class=\"orb\"></div>\n        <div class=\"orb\"></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">CS2916 &middot; 大语言模型</div>\n        <h1 class=\"gradient-text\">自我提升与自我进化算法</h1>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\">Self-Improving &amp; Self-Evolving Algorithms for LLMs</p>\n        <div class=\"cover-divider\"></div>\n        <p style=\"font-size:17px; color:var(--text-muted); line-height:1.8;\">\n          当大语言模型学会自己教自己\n        </p>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta\">\n          <span>上海交通大学</span>\n          <span>2026 春季学期</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 1: Hook - 在我们开始之前\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"hook\"\n         data-notes=\"30s - 制造悬念感。停顿一下再揭示'小测试'，让观众好奇。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2 style=\"color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 400;\">在我们开始之前</h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-lg\"></div>\n        <p class=\"big-text fragment\">先来一个小测试</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <p class=\"subtitle fragment\" style=\"font-size: 20px;\">看看大家对 AI 行业的\"苦\"了解多少</p>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 2: Interactive Poll\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"poll\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 这是第一个互动环节！让观众举手或喊出选项。可以说'选A的举手？选B的呢？' 营造参与感。点击对应选项显示'投票结果'，最后点揭晓按钮。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 36px); margin-bottom: 32px; line-height:1.4;\">\n          训练一个 ChatGPT 级别的模型<br>\n          背后需要多少条<span class=\"highlight-orange\">人工标注</span>数据？\n        </h2>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2x2\" id=\"pollOptions\">\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"a\" onclick=\"selectPoll('a')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">A</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 1,000 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"一个实习生一周搞定\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"b\" onclick=\"selectPoll('b')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">B</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 10,000 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"一个小团队忙几周\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"c\" onclick=\"selectPoll('c')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">C</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 100,000 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"要一个专业标注团队\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"d\" onclick=\"selectPoll('d')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">D</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 1,000,000+ 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"产业级标注流水线\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Simulated results bar chart -->\n        <div class=\"result-section\" id=\"pollResults\">\n          <div class=\"spacer-sm\"></div>\n          <div style=\"max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">A</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-a\" data-width=\"5\">5%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">B</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-b\" data-width=\"15\">15%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">C</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-c\" data-width=\"35\">35%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">D</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-d\" data-width=\"45\">45%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n          <button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"revealAnswer()\">揭晓答案</button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 3: The Reveal\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"reveal\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 给出震撼数据。强调数据量级，然后引出成本问题。'InstructGPT 仅仅是一个起点，后续的 GPT-4 需要的数据量更是指数级增长。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">答案揭晓</div>\n        <h2>远超你的想象</h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2 stagger\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-center\">\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 8px;\">InstructGPT (2022)</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 48px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--accent-orange);\">77K+</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">人类偏好比较数据</p>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-center\">\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 8px;\">GPT-4 / Claude 级别 (估算)</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 48px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">10M+</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">多轮标注 + 偏好数据</p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div class=\"fragment\">\n          <div class=\"callout\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n            <div class=\"callout-label\">关键事实</div>\n            <p>一条高质量 RLHF 偏好标注需要领域专家花费 <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">15-30 分钟</strong>。<br>\n            按最保守估算，InstructGPT 的标注成本就超过 <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">数百万美元</strong>。</p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 4: The Bottleneck\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"bottleneck\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 三个痛点逐一展开。每讲一个稍作停顿，让观众消化。'成本只是第一个问题...' '更致命的是第二个问题...' '还有一个被忽视的问题...'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2>人工标注：三座<span class=\"highlight-orange\">大山</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"margin-bottom: 36px;\">为什么靠人类标注无法持续扩展</p>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-3 stagger\">\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><text x=\"24\" y=\"30\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"22\" font-weight=\"bold\">$</text></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">成本爆炸</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">每条标注 $1 - $50<br>规模化后是天文数字<br>GPT-4 级别标注成本<br>可能超过 <strong>数千万美元</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">01</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><text x=\"24\" y=\"30\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"bold\">?</text></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">人才稀缺</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">数学推理要数学博士<br>代码标注要资深工程师<br>医学数据要执业医师<br><strong>去哪找 10 万个博士？</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">02</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#ef4444\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><text x=\"24\" y=\"30\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#ef4444\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"bold\">!</text></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">质量瓶颈</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">标注者之间一致性低<br>疲劳导致质量下降<br>主观偏好难以统一<br><strong>噪声累积、上限受限</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">03</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 5: The Pivot\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"pivot\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 这张是转折点，从问题过渡到解决方案。先让'如果...'停留一下（用 fragment），制造期待感。语气从沉重转向兴奋。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <p style=\"font-size: 22px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 32px;\">\n          人工标注不可持续，那怎么办？\n        </p>\n        <h1 class=\"fragment\">\n          如果<span class=\"gradient-text\">模型能自己来</span>呢？\n        </h1>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <p class=\"subtitle fragment\">\n          自己出题 &middot; 自己做题 &middot; 自己批改 &middot; 自己改进\n        </p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-lg\"></div>\n        <div class=\"fragment\" style=\"opacity: 0;\">\n          <p style=\"font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n            \"这听起来像自己拽着头发把自己从沼泽里拉出来？\"\n          </p>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px;\">\n            —— 没错，这正是 <span class=\"highlight-orange\">Bootstrap（自举）</span>的精髓\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 6: Bootstrap Concept\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"bootstrap\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 讲 Munchausen 的故事（简短有趣），然后过渡到技术直觉。关键强调：虽然听起来矛盾，但在正确的条件下确实 work。'模型的输出虽然不完美，但其中隐含着有价值的信号。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Core Idea</div>\n        <h2>自举（Bootstrap）：<span class=\"highlight-orange\">用自己提升自己</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; align-items: center;\">\n          <!-- Left: Story -->\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">Baron Munchausen 的故事</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              这位男爵掉进了沼泽，他的解决方案是——\n              <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">拽着自己的头发把自己拉了出来</strong>。\n            </p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.7;\">\n              这当然是吹牛。但在 AI 领域，\n              \"用自己的输出训练自己\"这件事，\n              在特定条件下<strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">真的可行</strong>。\n            </p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Right: Cycle diagram -->\n          <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n            <svg viewBox=\"0 0 300 300\" width=\"260\" height=\"260\">\n              <!-- Circular arrows -->\n              <defs>\n                <marker id=\"arrowhead\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                  <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n                </marker>\n                <linearGradient id=\"circGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"100%\">\n                  <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n                  <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n                </linearGradient>\n              </defs>\n\n              <!-- Center circle -->\n              <circle cx=\"150\" cy=\"150\" r=\"40\" fill=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.1)\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n              <text x=\"150\" y=\"145\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"13\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">LLM</text>\n              <text x=\"150\" y=\"162\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"10\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Model</text>\n\n              <!-- Top node: Generate -->\n              <rect x=\"105\" y=\"15\" width=\"90\" height=\"36\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n              <text x=\"150\" y=\"38\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Generate</text>\n\n              <!-- Right node: Evaluate -->\n              <rect x=\"215\" y=\"182\" width=\"80\" height=\"36\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n              <text x=\"255\" y=\"205\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Evaluate</text>\n\n              <!-- Left node: Train -->\n              <rect x=\"5\" y=\"182\" width=\"80\" height=\"36\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n              <text x=\"45\" y=\"205\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Train</text>\n\n              <!-- Arrows: circular flow -->\n              <!-- Top to Right -->\n              <path d=\"M 190 50 Q 240 90 240 180\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"url(#circGrad)\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowhead)\">\n                <animate attributeName=\"stroke-dasharray\" from=\"0,200\" to=\"200,0\" dur=\"1.5s\" fill=\"freeze\"/>\n              </path>\n              <!-- Right to Left -->\n              <path d=\"M 215 210 Q 150 260 85 210\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"url(#circGrad)\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowhead)\">\n                <animate attributeName=\"stroke-dasharray\" from=\"0,200\" to=\"200,0\" dur=\"1.5s\" begin=\"0.5s\" fill=\"freeze\"/>\n              </path>\n              <!-- Left to Top -->\n              <path d=\"M 60 182 Q 60 90 110 50\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"url(#circGrad)\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowhead)\">\n                <animate attributeName=\"stroke-dasharray\" from=\"0,200\" to=\"200,0\" dur=\"1.5s\" begin=\"1s\" fill=\"freeze\"/>\n              </path>\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div class=\"callout fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Key Insight</div>\n          <p>模型的输出虽然不完美，但其中<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">隐含着有价值的信号</strong>。\n          只要我们有办法<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">识别和筛选</strong>这些信号，就能用它们来提升模型自身。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 7: Student Analogy (3 Stages)\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"analogy\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 用学生学习的类比把三个阶段讲清楚。重点强调第三阶段（高亮卡片）。'Pre-training 就像读了所有维基百科——你知道了很多，但你不知道怎么跟人说话。SFT/RLHF 就像有老师手把手教你。而 Self-Improving 就是——你自己给自己布置作业、做完了自己批改。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2>LLM 的<span class=\"gradient-text\">成长三阶段</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"margin-bottom: 40px;\">从跟老师学到自己学</p>\n\n        <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr auto 1fr; gap: 16px; align-items: center; max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto;\" class=\"stagger\">\n          <!-- Stage 1 -->\n          <div class=\"stage-card\">\n            <div class=\"stage-number\">1</div>\n            <div class=\"stage-emoji\">\n              <svg width=\"52\" height=\"52\" viewBox=\"0 0 52 52\"><rect x=\"8\" y=\"6\" width=\"36\" height=\"40\" rx=\"4\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#94a3b8\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"16\" x2=\"36\" y2=\"16\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"24\" x2=\"32\" y2=\"24\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"32\" x2=\"28\" y2=\"32\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/></svg>\n            </div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Pre-training</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">读遍所有教科书</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px;\">\"知道很多，但不会说人话\"</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Arrow -->\n          <div class=\"stage-arrow\">\n            <svg width=\"32\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 32 24\"><path d=\"M 0 12 L 24 12 M 18 6 L 24 12 L 18 18\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/></svg>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Stage 2 -->\n          <div class=\"stage-card\">\n            <div class=\"stage-number\">2</div>\n            <div class=\"stage-emoji\">\n              <svg width=\"52\" height=\"52\" viewBox=\"0 0 52 52\"><circle cx=\"26\" cy=\"18\" r=\"10\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#94a3b8\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 14 46 C 14 34 38 34 38 46\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#94a3b8\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 34 12 L 40 6\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><circle cx=\"42\" cy=\"4\" r=\"2\" fill=\"#06b6d4\"/></svg>\n            </div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px;\">SFT / RLHF</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">老师手把手批改作业</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px;\">\"学会了，但老师很贵\"</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Arrow -->\n          <div class=\"stage-arrow\">\n            <svg width=\"32\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 32 24\"><path d=\"M 0 12 L 24 12 M 18 6 L 24 12 L 18 18\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/></svg>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Stage 3 (highlighted) -->\n          <div class=\"stage-card stage-highlight\">\n            <div class=\"stage-number\">3</div>\n            <div class=\"stage-emoji\">\n              <svg width=\"52\" height=\"52\" viewBox=\"0 0 52 52\">\n                <circle cx=\"26\" cy=\"22\" r=\"14\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n                <path d=\"M 20 22 C 20 16 32 16 32 22 C 32 28 20 28 20 22\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n                <circle cx=\"26\" cy=\"22\" r=\"4\" fill=\"#f97316\" opacity=\"0.6\"/>\n                <path d=\"M 26 8 L 26 4 M 40 22 L 44 22 M 12 22 L 8 22 M 36 12 L 39 9 M 16 12 L 13 9\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" opacity=\"0.4\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; color: var(--accent-orange);\">Self-Improving</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">自己出题、做题、批改</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 12px; color: var(--accent-orange); margin-top: 8px; font-weight: 500;\">\"今天的主角\"</p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 8: Panorama Map\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"panorama\"\n         data-notes=\"120s - 这是最关键的一张 slide，全场都会回来引用。逐一介绍三大分支，每个分支简要提一下包含哪些方法。不需要展开细讲，只要让观众'知道有这些东西'就好。'接下来三位同学会分别深入讲解这三大方向。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"panorama-wrapper\">\n          <div class=\"panorama-header\">\n            <h2><span class=\"gradient-text\">全景地图</span>：方法分类框架</h2>\n            <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Self-Improving &amp; Self-Evolving Algorithms</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Connector line -->\n          <div class=\"panorama-connector fragment\">\n            <div class=\"connector-line\"><span class=\"mid-dot\"></span></div>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Three branches -->\n          <div class=\"panorama-branches\">\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-orange fragment\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title highlight-orange\">自我提升</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">Self-Improving</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Self-Instruct <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自己出题</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> STaR <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自举推理</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Self-Refine <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自我改进</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> ReST <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">强化自训练</span></li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-cyan fragment\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title highlight-cyan\">自我博弈</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">Self-Play</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> SPIN <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自我博弈微调</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Self-Rewarding <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自我奖励</span></li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-green fragment\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title highlight-green\">自我进化</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">Self-Evolving</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Constitutional AI <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">宪法 AI</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> FunSearch <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">进化搜索</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> EvoPrompt <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">进化提示</span></li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 9: Transition & Key Questions\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"transition\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 收束全场，留下悬念。把三个问题念出来，语气从好奇到坚定。最后一句交棒：'带着这些疑问，接下来 XX 同学会带我们深入了解具体的方法。' 笑着走回座位。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2 style=\"margin-bottom: 36px;\">\n          带着这些问题<br>进入<span class=\"gradient-text\">具体方法</span>\n        </h2>\n\n        <div class=\"question-list stagger\">\n          <div class=\"question-item\">\n            <span class=\"q-number\">1</span>\n            <span class=\"q-text\">一个模型真的能通过<strong class=\"highlight-orange\">自己训练自己</strong>变得更强吗？</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"question-item\">\n            <span class=\"q-number\">2</span>\n            <span class=\"q-text\">这难道不就是\"<strong class=\"highlight-cyan\">自己批改自己的作业</strong>\"吗？</span>\n          </div>\n          <div </div>\n    </div>\n\n  </div><!-- end .presentation -->\n\n  <!-- =====================================================\n       Navigation UI\n       ===================================================== -->\n  <div class=\"progress-track\">\n    <div class=\"progress-fill\" id=\"progressFill\"></div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"nav-bar\">\n    <span class=\"nav-hint\"><kbd>&larr;</kbd> <kbd>&rarr;</kbd> navigate &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; <kbd>S</kbd> notes &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; <kbd>F</kbd> fullscreen</span>\n    <span class=\"slide-counter\" id=\"slideCounter\">1 / 10</span>\n  </div>\n\n  <!-- Speaker Notes Overlay -->\n  <div class=\"speaker-notes\" id=\"speakerNotes\"></div>\n\n  <!-- =====================================================\n       JavaScript\n       ===================================================== -->\n  <script>\n    (function() {\n      'use strict';\n\n      // ========== Slide Navigation ==========\n      const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');\n      const totalSlides = slides.length;\n      let currentSlide = 0;\n      let isAnimating = false;\n      let notesVisible = false;\n\n      function getFragments(slideEl) {\n        return Array.from(slideEl.querySelectorAll('.fragment:not(.visible)'));\n      }\n\n      function getAllFragments(slideEl) {\n        return Array.from(slideEl.querySelectorAll('.fragment'));\n      }\n\n      function updateUI() {\n        document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width =\n          ((currentSlide + 1) / totalSlides * 100) + '%';\n        document.getElementById('slideCounter').textContent =\n          (currentSlide + 1) + ' / ' + totalSlides;\n\n        // Update speaker notes\n        const notes = slides[currentSlide].getAttribute('data-notes') || '';\n        const notesEl = document.getElementById('speakerNotes');\n        notesEl.innerHTML = notes;\n      }\n\n      function goToSlide(index) {\n        if (index < 0 || index >= totalSlides || index === currentSlide || isAnimating) return;\n        isAnimating = true;\n\n        const direction = index > currentSlide ? 1 : -1;\n        const prevSlide = slides[currentSlide];\n        const nextSlide = slides[index];\n\n        // Reset fragments on next slide\n        getAllFragments(nextSlide).forEach(f => f.classList.remove('visible'));\n\n        prevSlide.classList.remove('active');\n        prevSlide.classList.add(direction > 0 ? 'exit-left' : '');\n        prevSlide.style.transform = direction > 0\n          ? 'translateX(-40px) scale(0.98)'\n          : 'translateX(40px) scale(0.98)';\n\n        nextSlide.style.transform = direction > 0\n          ? 'translateX(40px) scale(0.98)'\n          : 'translateX(-40px) scale(0.98)';\n        nextSlide.classList.add('active');\n\n        requestAnimationFrame(() => {\n          nextSlide.style.transform = '';\n        });\n\n        currentSlide = index;\n        updateUI();\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          prevSlide.classList.remove('exit-left');\n          prevSlide.style.transform = '';\n          isAnimating = false;\n        }, 500);\n      }\n\n      function nextStep() {\n        const hiddenFragments = getFragments(slides[currentSlide]);\n        if (hiddenFragments.length > 0) {\n          hiddenFragments[0].classList.add('visible');\n        } else {\n          goToSlide(currentSlide + 1);\n        }\n      }\n\n      function prevStep() {\n        const visibleFragments = getAllFragments(slides[currentSlide])\n          .filter(f => f.classList.contains('visible'));\n        if (visibleFragments.length > 0) {\n          visibleFragments[visibleFragments.length - 1].classList.remove('visible');\n        } else {\n          goToSlide(currentSlide - 1);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Keyboard controls\n      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {\n        switch(e.key) {\n          case 'ArrowRight':\n          case ' ':\n          case 'PageDown':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            nextStep();\n            break;\n          case 'ArrowLeft':\n          case 'PageUp':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            prevStep();\n            break;\n          case 'Home':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            goToSlide(0);\n            break;\n          case 'End':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            goToSlide(totalSlides - 1);\n            break;\n          case 's':\n          case 'S':\n            notesVisible = !notesVisible;\n            document.getElementById('speakerNotes').classList.toggle('show', notesVisible);\n            break;\n          case 'f':\n          case 'F':\n            if (!document.fullscreenElement) {\n              document.documentElement.requestFullscreen().catch(() => {});\n            } else {\n              document.exitFullscreen().catch(() => {});\n            }\n            break;\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Click navigation (left 30% goes back, right 70% goes forward)\n      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n        // Don't interfere with interactive elements\n        if (e.target.closest('.poll-option, .action-btn, button, a, input')) return;\n        if (e.clientX < window.innerWidth * 0.3) {\n          prevStep();\n        } else {\n          nextStep();\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Touch support\n      let touchStartX = 0;\n      document.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n        touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      document.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n        const diff = touchStartX - e.changedTouches[0].screenX;\n        if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) {\n          if (diff > 0) nextStep();\n          else prevStep();\n        }\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      // ========== Poll Interaction ==========\n      let pollAnswered = false;\n\n      window.selectPoll = function(option) {\n        if (pollAnswered) return;\n        pollAnswered = true;\n\n        document.querySelectorAll('.poll-option').forEach(el => {\n          el.classList.remove('selected');\n          el.style.pointerEvents = 'none';\n        });\n        document.querySelector(`.poll-option[data-option=\"${option}\"]`).classList.add('selected');\n\n        // Show result bars\n        const resultSection = document.getElementById('pollResults');\n        resultSection.classList.add('show');\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          document.querySelectorAll('.result-bar-fill').forEach(bar => {\n            bar.style.width = bar.getAttribute('data-width') + '%';\n          });\n        }, 100);\n      };\n\n      window.revealAnswer = function() {\n        // Highlight option D as correct\n        document.querySelectorAll('.poll-option').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));\n        document.querySelector('.poll-option[data-option=\"d\"]').classList.add('correct');\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').textContent = 'D 是最接近的答案';\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').style.background =\n          'linear-gradient(135deg, #22c55e, #16a34a)';\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').style.boxShadow =\n          '0 4px 16px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3)';\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').style.pointerEvents = 'none';\n      };\n\n      // ========== Init ==========\n      updateUI();\n    })();\n  </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":90,"cache_read_input_tokens":53672,"output_tokens":20102,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":90},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"48698242-9611-4d74-9b56-fa15ff687519","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:16:13.273Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}
