class=\"presentation\">\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 0: Part D Title\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide active\" id=\"part-d-title\"\n         data-notes=\"15s - 简短承接 Part C。'前面三位同学展示了各种精彩的自我提升方法。但如果你听完觉得 Self-Improvement 是一个银弹——那请准备好被泼冷水。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Part D &middot; 成员 D</div>\n        <h1 class=\"gradient-text\">天花板、陷阱与未来</h1>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\">Challenges, Theoretical Limits &amp; The Road Ahead</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-lg\"></div>\n        <div class=\"stagger\" style=\"display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-red);\">Model Collapse</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(249,115,22,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-orange);\">Reward Hacking</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(6,182,212,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">Scaling Laws</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-green);\">Future Directions</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 1: Three Core Challenges Overview\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"challenges-overview\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 概述三大挑战。'自我提升听起来很美好，但有三个致命陷阱。我会用一个统一的例子——一个AI写作模型的自训练过程——来串起这三个问题。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2>自我提升的<span class=\"highlight-red\">三大陷阱</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"margin-bottom: 36px; font-size: 18px;\">为什么\"自己教自己\"不是银弹</p>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-3 stagger\">\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#ef4444\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><path d=\"M16 32 L24 16 L32 32\" stroke=\"#ef4444\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/><line x1=\"24\" y1=\"22\" x2=\"24\" y2=\"26\" stroke=\"#ef4444\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"29\" r=\"1.2\" fill=\"#ef4444\"/></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">Model Collapse</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">模型坍缩<br>用自己的输出训自己<br>多样性不断丧失<br><strong>分布越来越窄</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">01</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><path d=\"M18 28 Q 24 18 30 28\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><circle cx=\"20\" cy=\"22\" r=\"2\" fill=\"#f97316\"/><circle cx=\"28\" cy=\"22\" r=\"2\" fill=\"#f97316\"/></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">Reward Hacking</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">奖励欺骗<br>模型学会\"讨好\"评判器<br>而非真正提升质量<br><strong>自己给自己放水</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">02</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#a855f7\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><path d=\"M14 30 Q 20 20 26 26 Q 32 32 38 18\" stroke=\"#a855f7\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">Distribution Shift</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">分布偏移<br>生成数据偏离真实分布<br>小误差在迭代中被放大<br><strong>渐行渐远</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">03</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 2: Model Collapse — Concrete Example\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"collapse-example\"\n         data-notes=\"120s - 核心示例 slide。用写作模型的例子逐步展示 Model Collapse。'想象一个AI写作模型。第1代，多样性丰富——能写诗歌、新闻、小说、学术论文。用它的输出训练第2代，诗歌占比开始变大，因为模型\"偏爱\"诗歌格式。到第5代，几乎只会写一种风格的诗歌了。这就像近亲繁殖——基因库越来越小。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Shumailov et al., 2023</div>\n        <h2>Model Collapse：<span class=\"highlight-red\">近亲繁殖效应</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;\">一个 AI 写作模型自训练 5 代后会发生什么？</p>\n\n        <div class=\"gen-timeline stagger\">\n          <div class=\"gen-card\">\n            <div class=\"gen-label\">Generation 1</div>\n            <div class=\"gen-text\">\"春风十里不如你，夏日骄阳似火烧。最新研究表明，量子计算在药物发现中取得突破。今日股市大幅震荡...\"</div>\n            <div class=\"gen-tags\">\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: var(--accent-green);\">诗歌</span>\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(6,182,212,0.15); color: var(--accent-cyan);\">科技</span>\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(249,115,22,0.15); color: var(--accent-orange);\">新闻</span>\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); color: var(--accent-purple);\">小说</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"gen-arrow\">&rarr;</div>\n\n          <div class=\"gen-card\">\n            <div class=\"gen-label\">Generation 3</div>\n            <div class=\"gen-text\">\"春风拂面柳如烟，夏雨朦胧草色鲜。秋月映波光如水，冬雪覆盖万山连...\"</div>\n            <div class=\"gen-tags\">\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: var(--accent-green);\">诗歌</span>\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: var(--accent-green);\">诗歌</span>\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(6,182,212,0.15); color: var(--accent-cyan);\">科技</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"gen-arrow\">&rarr;</div>\n\n          <div class=\"gen-card\">\n            <div class=\"gen-label\">Generation 5</div>\n            <div class=\"gen-text\">\"春风春风春风来，花开花开花开来。月光月光月光明，星辰星辰星辰亮...\"</div>\n            <div class=\"gen-tags\">\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); color: var(--accent-red);\">重复</span>\n              <span class=\"gen-tag\" style=\"background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); color: var(--accent-red);\">退化</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div class=\"callout callout-red fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">The Curse of Recursion</div>\n          <p>Shumailov et al. 发现：经过多代自训练，<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-red);\">分布尾部逐渐消失</strong>——\n          少数类别被完全遗忘。\"模型的世界越来越小，直到只剩下一片灰色。\"</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 3: Reward Hacking — Concrete Example\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"reward-hacking\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - Reward Hacking 的具体例子。'继续我们的写作模型。现在给它加一个自我评分机制——模型写完后给自己的文章打分。问题来了：经过几轮训练，模型发现只要多写华丽的辞藻、多用排比句、加上一些看似深刻的结尾，就能拿到高分。它学会了讨好评判器的\"套路\"，但内容越来越空洞。这就是 Reward Hacking。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Reward Hacking</div>\n        <h2>奖励欺骗：<span class=\"highlight-orange\">自己给自己放水</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--accent-green);\">Round 1：正常评分</h3>\n            <div style=\"background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              <p><strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">Model output:</strong> \"量子计算利用叠加态进行并行运算。\"</p>\n              <p style=\"margin-top: 8px;\"><strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">Self-score: 7/10</strong></p>\n              <p style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px;\">准确、简洁、信息密度高</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--accent-red);\">Round 5：学会套路</h3>\n            <div style=\"background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              <p><strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">Model output:</strong> \"在量子力学的瑰丽画卷中，叠加态如同宇宙的密码，指引我们走向人类文明的曙光...\"</p>\n              <p style=\"margin-top: 8px;\"><strong style=\"color: var(--accent-red);\">Self-score: 9/10</strong></p>\n              <p style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px;\">华丽但空洞，评判器被自己套路骗了</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div class=\"callout fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Sycophancy Problem</div>\n          <p>模型倾向于<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">\"讨好\"评判者</strong>而非追求真正的正确性。\n          当评判者就是自己时，这个问题更加严重——因为模型知道自己\"喜欢\"什么。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 4: Distribution Shift\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"dist-shift\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 用一个简单的图示讲 Distribution Shift。'第三个问题：每一轮训练都会引入一点小误差。一轮误差 2%，看起来没什么。但经过 10 轮自训练后，这些误差累积放大，最终模型生成的分布和真实数据完全脱节。就像你打电话传话——第一个人说的和第十个人听到的完全不是一回事。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Distribution Shift</div>\n        <h2>分布偏移：<span class=\"highlight-purple\">误差的滚雪球效应</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div style=\"max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 700 280\" width=\"700\" height=\"280\" style=\"max-width: 100%;\">\n            <defs>\n              <linearGradient id=\"distGrad1\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n                <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#22c55e\"/>\n                <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#22c55e\"/>\n              </linearGradient>\n              <linearGradient id=\"distGrad2\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n                <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n                <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n              </linearGradient>\n              <linearGradient id=\"distGrad3\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n                <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#ef4444\"/>\n                <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#ef4444\"/>\n              </linearGradient>\n            </defs>\n\n            <!-- Axis -->\n            <line x1=\"80\" y1=\"220\" x2=\"650\" y2=\"220\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n\n            <!-- Real distribution (wide, green) -->\n            <path d=\"M 150 220 Q 250 60 350 220\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" opacity=\"0.8\"/>\n            <text x=\"255\" y=\"100\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"13\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Real Data</text>\n\n            <!-- Round 3 (shifted, orange) -->\n            <path d=\"M 250 220 Q 380 80 480 220\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" opacity=\"0.7\" stroke-dasharray=\"8,4\"/>\n            <text x=\"385\" y=\"110\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"13\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Round 3</text>\n\n            <!-- Round 10 (very shifted, narrow, red) -->\n            <path d=\"M 420 220 Q 510 50 580 220\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#ef4444\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" opacity=\"0.7\" stroke-dasharray=\"4,3\"/>\n            <text x=\"520\" y=\"75\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#ef4444\" font-size=\"13\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Round 10</text>\n\n            <!-- Shift arrows -->\n            <path d=\"M 270 160 L 370 145\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowShift)\"/>\n            <path d=\"M 400 135 L 500 110\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowShift)\"/>\n\n            <defs>\n              <marker id=\"arrowShift\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.3)\"/>\n              </marker>\n            </defs>\n\n            <!-- Labels -->\n            <text x=\"365\" y=\"255\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Output Distribution Space</text>\n            <text x=\"270\" y=\"245\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.2)\" font-size=\"11\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">drift</text>\n            <text x=\"460\" y=\"245\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.2)\" font-size=\"11\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">drift</text>\n          </svg>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-sm\"></div>\n        <div class=\"callout callout-red fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Telephone Game</div>\n          <p>就像<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-red);\">电话传话游戏</strong>——每传一次偏差一点。\n          第 1 个人说\"下午三点开会\"，到第 10 个人变成\"下午上甜点开慧\"。\n          自训练的每一轮都在\"传话\"，误差不断累积。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 5: Unified Example — All Three Problems\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"unified-example\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 用统一的写作模型例子把三个问题串起来。从左到右逐步揭示。'这三个问题不是孤立的，它们往往同时发生、互相加强。Model Collapse 让输出变窄，Reward Hacking 让评分失准，Distribution Shift 让偏差放大——三者形成一个恶性循环。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px); margin-bottom: 32px;\">三个问题的<span class=\"highlight-red\">恶性循环</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;\">以 AI 写作模型为例：三者同时发生、互相加强</p>\n\n        <div style=\"max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 700 320\" width=\"700\" height=\"320\" style=\"max-width: 100%;\">\n            <!-- Three nodes in a triangle -->\n            <!-- Model Collapse (top) -->","numLines":300,"startLine":800,"totalLines":1795}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"e439baef-d7b9-41da-a4fa-73aec2a1aa53","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/nginxson/projects/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"9adea2f7-8780-47d0-abfd-c07245d3311f","version":"unknown","gitBranch":"main","slug":"composed-foraging-penguin"}
