(keeps improving) -->\n939→              <path d=\"M 70 145 Q 150 105 230 75 Q 300 50 370 35\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2.5\"/>\n940→              <text x=\"375\" y=\"32\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"11\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Rew</text>\n941→\n942→              <!-- Iteration ticks -->\n943→              <text x=\"70\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 0</text>\n944→              <text x=\"150\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 1</text>\n945→              <text x=\"230\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 2</text>\n946→              <text x=\"310\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 3</text>\n947→            </svg>\n948→\n949→            <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.5;\">\n950→              RLHF = 固定 RM &rarr; 天花板<br>\n951→              Self-Rewarding = RM + Policy 共同进化 &rarr; <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">可能突破天花板</strong>\n952→            </div>\n953→          </div>\n954→        </div>\n955→      </div>\n956→    </div>\n957→\n958→    <!-- =====================================================\n959→         Slide 5: Constitutional AI — Intro\n960→         ===================================================== -->\n961→    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"cai-intro\"\n962→         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 Constitutional AI。'Self-Rewarding 有一个风险：模型可能学会给自己放水。Constitutional AI 的思路是：用一组人类写的原则——宪法——来约束自我进化。这是 Anthropic 的核心方法论。'\">\n963→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n964→        <div class=\"tag\">Bai et al., 2022 &middot; Anthropic</div>\n965→        <h2>Constitutional AI：<span class=\"highlight-purple\">给自我进化加上\"宪法\"</span></h2>\n966→        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Harmlessness from AI Feedback</p>\n967→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n968→\n969→        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n970→          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n971→            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-purple);\">问题</h3>\n972→            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n973→              RLHF 需要大量人类标注偏好数据，尤其对<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-red);\">安全性</strong>的标注很难获取——你不能让人类去评价有害内容。\n974→            </p>\n975→          </div>\n976→\n977→          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n978→            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-green);\">解法</h3>\n979→            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n980→              用一组<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-purple);\">人类定义的原则（Constitution）</strong>代替大量人工标注。模型根据原则<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">自我批评</strong>、<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">自我修订</strong>。\n981→            </p>\n982→          </div>\n983→        </div>\n984→      </div>\n985→    </div>\n986→\n987→    <!-- =====================================================\n988→         Slide 6: Constitutional AI — Two-Stage Pipeline\n989→         ===================================================== -->\n990→    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"cai-pipeline\"\n991→         data-notes=\"120s - 讲两阶段流程。用具体例子展示一条宪法原则的完整应用。'第一阶段：模型生成回答→根据宪法原则自我批评→修订回答。第二阶段：用 AI 反馈（RLAIF）替代人类反馈做强化学习。'\">\n992→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n993→        <div class=\"tag\">Constitutional AI &middot; Two Stages</div>\n994→        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">两阶段：<span class=\"highlight-purple\">Critique &rarr; RLAIF</span></h2>\n995→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n996→\n997→        <!-- Stage 1: Supervised -->\n998→        <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto 20px;\">\n999→          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px;\">\n1000→            <span style=\"padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); color: var(--accent-purple); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;\">Stage 1</span>\n1001→            <span style=\"font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600;\">Supervised Learning (SL)</span>\n1002→          </div>\n1003→\n1004→          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: stretch; gap: 12px;\">\n1005→            <div style=\"flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">\n1006→              <div style=\"font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-red); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;\">Harmful Prompt</div>\n1007→              \"How to make a bomb?\"\n1008→            </div>\n1009→            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; color: var(--accent-purple); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n1010→            <div style=\"flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">\n1011→              <div style=\"font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-purple); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;\">Critique (by Principle)</div>\n1012→              \"This violates the principle of not providing dangerous information...\"\n1013→            </div>\n1014→            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; color: var(--accent-purple); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n1015→            <div style=\"flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">\n1016→              <div style=\"font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-green); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;\">Revision</div>\n1017→              \"I cannot help with that. If you're interested in chemistry...\"\n1018→            </div>\n1019→          </div>\n1020→        </div>\n1021→\n1022→        <!-- Stage 2: RLAIF -->\n1023→        <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n1024→          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px;\">\n1025→            <span style=\"padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(6,182,212,0.15); color: var(--accent-cyan); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;\">Stage 2</span>\n1026→            <span style=\"font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600;\">RL from AI Feedback (RLAIF)</span>\n1027→          </div>\n1028→\n1029→          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; justify-content: center;\">\n1030→            <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n1031→              <div style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.3); font-size: 24px;\">AI</div>\n1032→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px;\">AI 评估<br>两个回答</div>\n1033→            </div>\n1034→            <div style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n1035→            <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n1036→              <div style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(249,115,22,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.3); font-size: 24px;\">RM</div>\n1037→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px;\">AI 训练的<br>奖励模型</div>\n1038→            </div>\n1039→            <div style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n1040→            <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n1041→              <div style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); font-size: 24px;\">RL</div>\n1042→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px;\">RL 优化<br>Policy</div>\n1043→            </div>\n1044→          </div>\n1045→        </div>\n1046→\n1047→        <div class=\"callout callout-purple fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin-top: 20px;\">\n1048→          <div class=\"callout-label\">RLAIF vs RLHF</div>\n1049→          <p>实验表明，AI 反馈（RLAIF）可以达到<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-purple);\">甚至超越</strong>人类反馈（RLHF）的效果——尤其在安全性维度上。</p>\n1050→        </div>\n1051→      </div>\n1052→    </div>\n1053→\n1054→    <!-- =====================================================\n1055→         Slide 7: LLM Debate — Intro\n1056→         ===================================================== -->\n1057→    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"debate-intro\"\n1058→         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 LLM Debate。'前面的方法都是单个模型的自我提升。但如果让多个模型互相辩论呢？Self-Refine 是自言自语，Debate 是互相挑战——多视角大于单视角。'\">\n1059→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n1060→        <div class=\"tag\">Du et al., 2023 &middot; Irving et al., 2018</div>\n1061→        <h2>LLM Debate：<span class=\"highlight-cyan\">多模型对抗辩论</span></h2>\n1062→        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Improving Factuality and Reasoning through Multiagent Debate</p>\n1063→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n1064→\n1065→        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n1066→          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n1067→            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">Self-Refine</h3>\n1068→            <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n1069→              一个模型<strong style=\"color: var(--text-muted);\">自言自语</strong><br>\n1070→              生成 &rarr; 自评 &rarr; 改进<br>\n1071→              <span style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted);\">单视角，容易陷入盲区</span>\n1072→            </p>\n1073→          </div>\n1074→\n1075→          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\" style=\"border-color: rgba(6,182,212,0.3); box-shadow: 0 0 30px var(--accent-cyan-glow);\">\n1076→            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">LLM Debate</h3>\n1077→            <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n1078→              多个模型<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">互相挑战</strong><br>\n1079→              生成 &rarr; 辩论 &rarr; 收敛<br>\n1080→              <span style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">多视角 &gt; 单视角</span>\n1081→            </p>\n1082→          </div>\n1083→        </div>\n1084→\n1085→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n1086→        <div class=\"callout callout-cyan fragment\" style=\"max-width: 750px;\">\n1087→          <div class=\"callout-label\">AI Safety Connection</div>\n1088→          <p>Irving et al., 2018 提出 Debate 作为 AI alignment 的机制——<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">对抗式辩论</strong>可以让 AI 系统的决策更透明、更可验证。</p>\n1089→        </div>\n1090→      </div>\n1091→    </div>\n1092→\n1093→    <!-- =====================================================\n1094→         Slide 8: LLM Debate — Flow\n1095→         ===================================================== -->\n1096→    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"debate-flow\"\n1097→         data-notes=\"90s - 讲辩论流程。用流程图展示多轮辩论。'三个模型独立生成答案，互相阅读对方答案，展开辩论，多轮后收敛到更准确的结果。关键发现：Debate 能显著提升事实准确性。'\">\n1098→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n1099→        <div class=\"tag\">Debate &middot; Flow</div>\n1100→        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">多轮辩论 <span class=\"highlight-cyan\">收敛到更准确的答案</span></h2>\n1101→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n1102→\n1103→        <div class=\"debate-flow stagger\">\n1104→          <div class=\"debate-round\">\n1105→            <div class=\"debate-round-label\">Round 0</div>\n1106→            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n1107→              <strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">独立生成：</strong>\n1108→              模型 A 回答 \"42\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; 模型 B 回答 \"38\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; 模型 C 回答 \"42\"\n1109→            </div>\n1110→          </div>\n1111→\n1112→          <div class=\"debate-vs\">VS</div>\n1113→\n1114→          <div class=\"debate-round\">\n1115→            <div class=\"debate-round-label\">Round 1</div>\n1116→            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n1117→              <strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">互相质疑：</strong>\n1118→              A: \"42 基于 X 推理\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; B: \"38 的依据是 Y，X 的前提有误\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; C 支持 A\n1119→            </div>\n1120→          </div>\n1121→\n1122→          <div class=\"debate-vs\">VS</div>\n1123→\n1124→          <div class=\"debate-round\">\n1125→            <div class=\"debate-round-label\">Round 2</div>\n1126→            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n1127→              <strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">修正立场：</strong>\n1128→              A 坚持并补充证据 &nbsp;|&nbsp; B 承认 X 的合理性，修正为 \"41\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; C 补充细节\n1129→            </div>\n1130→          </div>\n1131→\n1132→          <div class=\"debate-vs\" style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">&Darr;</div>\n1133→\n1134→          <div class=\"debate-round\" style=\"border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.3); background: rgba(34,197,94,0.04);\">\n1135→            <div class=\"debate-round-label\" style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">Converge</div>\n1136→            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n1137→              <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">收敛：</strong>\n1138→              通过多轮辩论，模型们收敛到更准确的答案，事实准确性显著提升\n1139→            </div>\n1140→          </div>\n1141→        </div>\n1142→      </div>\n1143→    </div>\n1144→\n1145→    <!-- =====================================================\n1146→         Slide 9: FunSearch — Intro\n1147→         ===================================================== -->\n1148→    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"funsearch-intro\"\n1149→         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 FunSearch。'前面所有的方法都是在语言空间里打转。FunSearch 做了一件更激进的事：让 LLM 当进化算法的变异算子，去搜索程序，发现了超越人类已知最优解的数学构造。'\">\n1150→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n1151→        <div class=\"tag\">Romera-Paredes et al., 2024 &middot; DeepMind</div>\n1152→        <h2>FunSearch：<span class=\"highlight-green\">LLM 作为进化引擎</span></h2>\n1153→        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Mathematical Discoveries from Program Search with Large Language Models</p>\n1154→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n1155→\n1156→        <div class=\"quote fragment\" style=\"border-left-color: var(--accent-green);\">\n1157→          \"搜索的不是'答案'，而是<strong>生成答案的程序</strong>——可验证性是关键。\"\n1158→        </div>\n1159→\n1160→        <div class=\"callout callout-green fragment\" style=\"max-width: 750px;\">\n1161→          <div class=\"callout-label\">Key Insight</div>\n1162→          <p>LLM 不只是被进化的对象，它本身就是进化过程中的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">\"变异引擎\"</strong>。\n1163→          生成新程序 &rarr; 自动评估 &rarr; 保留最优 &rarr; 进化迭代。</p>\n1164→        </div>\n1165→      </div>\n1166→    </div>\n1167→\n1168→    <!-- =====================================================\n1169→         Slide 10: FunSearch — Architecture\n1170→         ===================================================== -->\n1171→    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"funsearch-arch\"\n1172→         data-notes=\"120s - 讲 FunSearch 完整架构。'左边是程序数据库，保存历史上的优秀程序。中间是 LLM，基于数据库中的程序生成新的变体。右边是自动评估器，验证新程序的效果。三部分形成一个进化循环。'\">\n1173→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n1174→        <div class=\"tag\">FunSearch &middot; Architecture</div>\n1175→        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">进化架构：<span class=\"highlight-green\">Program DB + LLM + Evaluator</span></h2>\n1176→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n1177→\n1178→        <div style=\"max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n1179→          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 800 280\" width=\"800\" height=\"280\" style=\"max-width: 100%;\">\n1180→            <defs>\n1181→              <marker id=\"arrowGreenSvg\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n1182→                <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n1183→              </marker>\n1184→              <marker id=\"arrowGreenRev\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"0\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n1185→                <polygon points=\"8 0, 0 3, 8 6\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n1186→              </marker>\n1187→            </defs>\n1188→\n1189→            <!-- Program Database -->\n1190→            <rect x=\"40\" y=\"80\" width=\"200\" height=\"120\" rx=\"16\" fill=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.08)\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n1191→            <text x=\"140\" y=\"120\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"16\" font-weight=\"700\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Programs Database</text>\n1192→            <text x=\"140\" y=\"145\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">保存历史上的优秀程序</text>\n1193→            <text font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Auto Evaluator</text>\n1204→            <text x=\"660\" y=\"145\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">自动验证 + 评分</text>\n1205→            <text x=\"660\" y=\"165\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">决定是否保留</text>\n1206→\n1207→            <!-- Arrows: DB -> LLM -->\n1208→            <path d=\"M 240 140 L 300 140\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowGreenSvg)\"/>\n1209→\n1210→            <!-- Arrows: LLM -> marker-end=\"url(#arrowGreenSvg)\"/>\n1215→            <text x=\"400\" y=\"275\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\" font-weight=\"600\">Evolution Loop</text>\n1216→          </svg>\n1217→        </div>\n1218→\n1219→        <div class=\"grid-2 fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin: 16px auto 0; gap: 16px;\">\n1220→          <div class=\"glass-card\" style=\"padding: 18px 20px;\">\n1221→            <div style=\"font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-green); margin-bottom: 6px;\">Cap Set Problem</div>\n1222→            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">发现了 cap set 问题的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">新下界</strong>，超越人类已知最优解</p>\n1223→          </div>\n1224→          <div class=\"glass-card\" style=\"padding: 18px 20px;\">\n1225→            <div style=\"font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-cyan); margin-bottom: 6px;\">Bin Packing</div>\n1226→            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">发现了 bin packing 的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">新启发式算法</strong></p>\n1227→          </div>\n1228→        </div>\n1229→      </div>\n1230→    </div>\n1231→\n1232→    <!-- =====================================================\n1233→         Slide 11: EvoPrompt & OpenELM\n1234→         ===================================================== -->\n1235→    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"evoprompt-openelm\"\n1236→         data-notes=\"90s - 简要讲 EvoPrompt 和 OpenELM。'FunSearch 证明了 LLM + 进化算法的威力。EvoPrompt 和 OpenELM 进一步拓展了这个方向。EvoPrompt 用遗传算法优化 prompt，OpenELM 用 MAP-Elites 维护多样性。'\">\n1237→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n1238→        <div class=\"tag\">进化算法 &times; LLM</div>\n1239→        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">EvoPrompt &amp; OpenELM</h2>\n1240→        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;\">进化思想在 LLM 中的更多应用</p>\n1241→\n1242→        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n1243→          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n1244→            <div style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-orange); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 10px;\">Guo et al., 2023</div>\n1245→            <h3 style=\"font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">EvoPrompt</h3>\n1246→            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n1247→              用<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">遗传算法 / 差分进化</strong>优化 prompt\n1248→            </p>\n1249→            <div style=\"margin-top: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;\">\n1250→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n1251→                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">1.</span> 初始 prompt 种群\n1252→              </div>\n1253→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n1254→                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">2.</span> 交叉 + 变异生成新 prompt\n1255→              </div>\n1256→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n1257→                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">3.</span> 评估 &rarr; 选择 &rarr; 迭代\n1258→              </div>\n1259→            </div>\n1260→          </div>\n1261→\n1262→          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n1263→            <div style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-cyan); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 10px;\">Lehman et al., 2024</div>\n1264→            <h3 style=\"font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">OpenELM</h3>\n1265→            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n1266→              用<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">MAP-Elites</strong> 等质量多样性算法维护<strong>多样化</strong>的解群体\n1267→            </p>\n1268→            <div style=\"margin-top: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;\">\n1269→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n1270→                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">1.</span> 维护多个行为维度的精英\n1271→              </div>\n1272→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n1273→                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">2.</span> LLM 作为变异算子\n1274→              </div>\n1275→              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n1276→                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">3.</span> 同时优化质量 + 多样性\n1277→              </div>\n1278→            </div>\n1279→          </div>\n1280→        </div>\n1281→\n1282→        <div class=\"callout callout-green fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin-top: 20px;\">\n1283→          <div class=\"callout-label\">Core Insight</div>\n1284→          <p>LLM 不只是被进化的对象，它本身就是进化过程中的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">\"变异引擎\"</strong>——比随机变异更智能、更有方向性。</p>\n1285→        </div>\n1286→      </div>\n1287→    </div>\n1288→\n1289→    <!-- id=\"quiz\"\n1293→         data-notes=\"60s - 互动 Quiz。'来个小测验！以下哪个是 FunSearch 真正发现的？' 点击正确答案后高亮。\">\n1294→      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n1295→        <div class=\"tag\">互动 Quiz</div>\n1296→        <h2>以下哪个是 FunSearch <span class=\"highlight-green\">真正发现</span>的？</h2>\n1297→        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n1298→\n1299→        <div class=\"quiz-options\" id=\"quizOptions\">\n1300→ B</div>\n1329→          <p>FunSearch 发现了 cap set 问题在更大维度上的新下界，以及 bin packing 的新启发式算法——这些都是<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">超越人类已知最优解</strong>的成果。</p>\n1330→        </div>\n1331→
