-->","originalFile":"<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"zh-CN\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n  <title>自我提升与自我进化算法 - Part C</title>\n  <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com\">\n  <link href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Noto+Sans+SC:wght@300;400;500;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap\" rel=\"stylesheet\">\n  <style>\n    /* ============================================================\n       CSS Variables & Reset\n       ============================================================ */\n    :root {\n      --bg-primary: #0a0f1e;\n      --bg-secondary: #111827;\n      --bg-card: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);\n      --bg-card-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n      --text-primary: #f1f5f9;\n      --text-secondary: #94a3b8;\n      --text-muted: #64748b;\n      --accent-orange: #f97316;\n      --accent-orange-glow: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.3);\n      --accent-cyan: #06b6d4;\n      --accent-cyan-glow: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.3);\n      --accent-green: #22c55e;\n      --accent-green-glow: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3);\n      --accent-purple: #a855f7;\n      --accent-red: #ef4444;\n      --border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n      --border-light: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);\n      --radius: 16px;\n      --radius-sm: 10px;\n      --shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n      --font-sans: 'Inter', 'Noto Sans SC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;\n      --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', Consolas, monospace;\n    }\n\n    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n    html, body {\n      width: 100%; height: 100%;\n      font-family: var(--font-sans);\n      background: var(--bg-primary);\n      color: var(--text-primary);\n      overflow: hidden;\n      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Slide Framework\n       ============================================================ */\n    .presentation {\n      width: 100%; height: 100%;\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    .slide {\n      position: absolute;\n      inset: 0;\n      display: flex;\n      flex-direction: column;\n      justify-content: center;\n      align-items: center;\n      padding: 50px 80px;\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateX(40px) scale(0.98);\n      transition: opacity 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),\n                  transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);\n      pointer-events: none;\n      z-index: 0;\n      background:\n        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.03) 0%, transparent 50%),\n        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 50%, rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.03) 0%, transparent 50%),\n        linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg-primary) 0%, #0d1525 100%);\n    }\n\n    .slide::before {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute; inset: 0;\n      background:\n        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px, transparent 1px),\n        linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px, transparent 1px);\n      background-size: 60px 60px;\n      pointer-events: none;\n    }\n\n    .slide.active {\n      opacity: 1;\n      transform: translateX(0) scale(1);\n      pointer-events: all;\n      z-index: 1;\n    }\n\n    .slide.exit-left {\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateX(-40px) scale(0.98);\n    }\n\n    .slide-content {\n      position: relative;\n      z-index: 1;\n      width: 100%;\n      max-width: 1100px;\n      text-align: center;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Fragments\n       ============================================================ */\n    .fragment {\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateY(20px);\n      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;\n    }\n\n    .fragment.visible {\n      opacity: 1;\n      transform: translateY(0);\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Typography\n       ============================================================ */\n    h1 {\n      font-size: clamp(42px, 5vw, 72px);\n      font-weight: 800;\n      line-height: 1.15;\n      letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n      margin-bottom: 16px;\n    }\n\n    h2 {\n      font-size: clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 48px);\n      font-weight: 700;\n      line-height: 1.25;\n      letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    h3 {\n      font-size: clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 32px);\n      font-weight: 600;\n      line-height: 1.3;\n      margin-bottom: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .subtitle {\n      font-size: clamp(18px, 2vw, 28px);\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      font-weight: 400;\n      line-height: 1.5;\n    }\n\n    .big-text {\n      font-size: clamp(32px, 4vw, 56px);\n      font-weight: 700;\n      line-height: 1.3;\n    }\n\n    .gradient-text {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-orange) 0%, var(--accent-cyan) 100%);\n      -webkit-background-clip: text;\n      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n      background-clip: text;\n    }\n\n    .gradient-text-reverse {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan) 0%, var(--accent-green) 100%);\n      -webkit-background-clip: text;\n      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;\n      background-clip: text;\n    }\n\n    .highlight-orange { color: var(--accent-orange); }\n    .highlight-cyan { color: var(--accent-cyan); }\n    .highlight-green { color: var(--accent-green); }\n    .highlight-purple { color: var(--accent-purple); }\n    .highlight-red { color: var(--accent-red); }\n\n    .tag {\n      display: inline-block;\n      padding: 6px 18px;\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      font-weight: 500;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      margin-bottom: 24px;\n    }\n\n    .quote {\n      font-size: clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 30px);\n      font-style: italic;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-orange);\n      padding-left: 24px;\n      text-align: left;\n      max-width: 800px;\n      margin: 24px auto;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Cards & Containers\n       ============================================================ */\n    .glass-card {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 32px;\n      transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    }\n\n    .glass-card:hover {\n      background: var(--bg-card-hover);\n      border-color: var(--border-light);\n      transform: translateY(-2px);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    }\n\n    .grid-2 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 24px;\n      width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    .grid-3 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 24px;\n      width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    .grid-4 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 20px;\n      width: 100%;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Cycle / Flow Diagram\n       ============================================================ */\n    .cycle-container {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      gap: 20px;\n      margin: 32px auto;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n      max-width: 800px;\n    }\n\n    .cycle-node {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 2px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 20px 28px;\n      text-align: center;\n      min-width: 160px;\n      transition: all 0.4s ease;\n    }\n\n    .cycle-node.active-node {\n      border-color: var(--accent-cyan);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--accent-cyan-glow);\n    }\n\n    .cycle-arrow {\n      font-size: 28px;\n      color: var(--accent-cyan);\n      animation: pulse-arrow 2s ease-in-out infinite;\n    }\n\n    @keyframes pulse-arrow {\n      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translateX(0); }\n      50% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(5px); }\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Callout Box\n       ============================================================ */\n    .callout {\n      background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.06);\n      border: 1px solid rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.2);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 24px 28px;\n      text-align: left;\n      max-width: 700px;\n      margin: 24px auto 0;\n    }\n\n    .callout-label {\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n      color: var(--accent-orange);\n      margin-bottom: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .callout p {\n      font-size: 17px;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n    }\n\n    .callout-cyan {\n      background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.06);\n      border-color: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);\n    }\n    .callout-cyan .callout-label { color: var(--accent-cyan); }\n\n    .callout-green {\n      background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.06);\n      border-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2);\n    }\n    .callout-green .callout-label { color: var(--accent-green); }\n\n    .callout-purple {\n      background: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.06);\n      border-color: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2);\n    }\n    .callout-purple .callout-label { color: var(--accent-purple); }\n\n    .callout-red {\n      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.06);\n      border-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);\n    }\n    .callout-red .callout-label { color: var(--accent-red); }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Pillar Cards\n       ============================================================ */\n    .pillar-card {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 36px 28px;\n      text-align: center;\n      position: relative;\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-card::after {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 3px;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-card:nth-child(1)::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-cyan), #38bdf8); }\n    .pillar-card:nth-child(2)::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-orange), #fbbf24); }\n    .pillar-card:nth-child(3)::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-green), #4ade80); }\n\n    .pillar-icon {\n      font-size: 48px;\n      margin-bottom: 16px;\n      display: block;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-title {\n      font-size: 22px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      margin-bottom: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-desc {\n      font-size: 15px;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      line-height: 1.6;\n    }\n\n    .pillar-number {\n      font-size: 64px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      opacity: 0.06;\n      position: absolute;\n      bottom: -10px; right: 16px;\n      line-height: 1;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Stagger Animations\n       ============================================================ */\n    .stagger > * {\n      opacity: 0;\n      transform: translateY(20px);\n      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;\n    }\n\n    .slide.active .stagger > *,\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > * {\n      opacity: 1;\n      transform: translateY(0);\n    }\n\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.1s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.2s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.3s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 0.4s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(5) { transition-delay: 0.5s; }\n    .slide.active .stagger > *:nth-child(6) { transition-delay: 0.6s; }\n\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > *:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.1s; }\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > *:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.25s; }\n    .fragment.visible .stagger > *:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.4s; }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Quiz Styles\n       ============================================================ */\n    .quiz-options {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 16px;\n      max-width: 750px;\n      margin: 28px auto 0;\n    }\n\n    .quiz-option {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 2px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 20px 24px;\n      text-align: left;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      transition: all 0.3s ease;\n      font-size: 16px;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n    }\n\n    .quiz-option:hover {\n      border-color: var(--border-light);\n      background: var(--bg-card-hover);\n      transform: translateY(-2px);\n    }\n\n    .quiz-option.correct {\n      border-color: var(--accent-green);\n      background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.08);\n      color: var(--accent-green);\n    }\n\n    .quiz-option.wrong {\n      border-color: var(--accent-red);\n      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.08);\n      color: var(--accent-red);\n      opacity: 0.6;\n    }\n\n    .quiz-option-label {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      width: 28px; height: 28px;\n      border-radius: 8px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n      font-weight: 700;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      margin-right: 12px;\n      flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .quiz-option.correct .quiz-option-label {\n      background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2);\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Iteration Curve (Self-Rewarding)\n       ============================================================ */\n    .iter-curve-container {\n      max-width: 700px;\n      margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Debate Flow\n       ============================================================ */\n    .debate-flow {\n      display: flex;\n      flex-direction: column;\n      gap: 16px;\n      max-width: 800px;\n      margin: 24px auto 0;\n    }\n\n    .debate-round {\n      background: var(--bg-card);\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 18px 24px;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 20px;\n      text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .debate-round-label {\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n      color: var(--accent-cyan);\n      white-space: nowrap;\n      min-width: 80px;\n    }\n\n    .debate-round-content {\n      font-size: 15px;\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      line-height: 1.5;\n      flex: 1;\n    }\n\n    .debate-vs {\n      text-align: center;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n      color: var(--accent-orange);\n      letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Panorama Map (reuse from A/B)\n       ============================================================ */\n    .panorama-wrapper {\n      width: 100%;\n      max-width: 1000px;\n      margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .panorama-branches {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 24px;\n    }\n\n    .panorama-branch {\n      border-radius: var(--radius);\n      padding: 28px 20px;\n      text-align: center;\n      border: 1px solid var(--border);\n      position: relative;\n      overflow: hidden;\n      transition: all 0.4s ease;\n    }\n\n    .panorama-branch::before {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 4px;\n    }\n\n    .branch-orange { background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.04); }\n    .branch-orange::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f97316, #fbbf24); }\n    .branch-orange:hover { background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.08); border-color: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.3); }\n\n    .branch-cyan { background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.04); }\n    .branch-cyan::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #06b6d4, #38bdf8); }\n    .branch-cyan:hover { background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.08); border-color: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.3); }\n\n    .branch-green { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.04); }\n    .branch-green::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #22c55e, #4ade80); }\n    .branch-green:hover { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.08); border-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3); }\n\n    .branch-title {\n      font-size: 20px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      margin-bottom: 4px;\n    }\n\n    .branch-subtitle {\n      font-size: 13px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .branch-methods {\n      list-style: none;\n      text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .branch-methods li {\n      padding: 10px 14px;\n      margin-bottom: 8px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);\n      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);\n      font-size: 15px;\n      font-weight: 500;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      transition: all 0.2s ease;\n      cursor: default;\n    }\n\n    .branch-methods li:hover {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);\n    }\n\n    .method-dot {\n      width: 8px; height: 8px;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    .branch-orange .method-dot { background: var(--accent-orange); }\n    .branch-cyan .method-dot { background: var(--accent-cyan); }\n    .branch-green .method-dot { background: var(--accent-green); }\n\n    /* Highlight current branch */\n    .panorama-branch.lit {\n      border-color: var(--accent-cyan);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 40px var(--accent-cyan-glow);\n      background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.08);\n    }\n\n    .panorama-branch.dim {\n      opacity: 0.35;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Navigation UI\n       ============================================================ */\n    .nav-bar {\n      position: fixed;\n      bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 48px;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      padding: 0 30px;\n      z-index: 100;\n      background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(10, 15, 30, 0.8));\n    }\n\n    .progress-track {\n      position: fixed;\n      bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n      height: 3px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\n      z-index: 101;\n    }\n\n    .progress-fill {\n      height: 100%;\n      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-orange), var(--accent-cyan));\n      transition: width 0.4s ease;\n      border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0;\n    }\n\n    .slide-counter {\n      font-size: 13px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      font-weight: 500;\n      font-family: var(--font-mono);\n    }\n\n    .nav-hint {\n      font-size: 12px;\n      color: var(--text-muted);\n      opacity: 0.5;\n    }\n\n    .nav-hint kbd {\n      display: inline-block;\n      padding: 2px 8px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\n      border-radius: 4px;\n      font-family: var(--font-mono);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      margin: 0 2px;\n    }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Speaker Notes Overlay\n       ============================================================ */\n    .speaker-notes {\n      position: fixed;\n      bottom: 48px; left: 0; right: 0;\n      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);\n      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n      color: var(--text-secondary);\n      padding: 16px 30px;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n      z-index: 99;\n      display: none;\n      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);\n      max-height: 120px;\n      overflow-y: auto;\n    }\n\n    .speaker-notes.show { display: block; }\n    .speaker-notes strong { color: var(--accent-orange); }\n\n    /* ============================================================\n       Misc & Responsive\n       ============================================================ */\n    .spacer-sm { height: 16px; }\n    .spacer-md { height: 28px; }\n    .spacer-lg { height: 40px; }\n\n    .text-center { text-align: center; }\n    .text-left { text-align: left; }\n    .mx-auto { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }\n\n    @keyframes fadeUpIn {\n      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }\n      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n    }\n\n    @keyframes pulse-glow {\n      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.1); }\n      50% { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.3); }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 900px) {\n      .slide { padding: 30px 24px; }\n      .grid-3, .panorama-branches { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n      .grid-2, .grid-4 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }\n      .cycle-container { flex-direction: column; }\n      .quiz-options { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n    }\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class=\"presentation\">\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 0: Part C Title\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide active\" id=\"part-c-title\"\n         data-notes=\"15s - 简短承接 Part B。'Part B 介绍了模型怎么单向地提升自己。接下来，我们看更激进的方法——模型和自己对弈、自己当裁判、甚至像生物一样进化。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Part C &middot; 成员 C</div>\n        <h1 class=\"gradient-text-reverse\">自我博弈与自我进化</h1>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\">Self-Play, AI Feedback &amp; Self-Evolving Methods</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-lg\"></div>\n        <div class=\"stagger\" style=\"display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;\">\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(6,182,212,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">SPIN</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(249,115,22,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-orange);\">Self-Rewarding</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-purple);\">Constitutional AI</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-green);\">FunSearch</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 1: SPIN — Self-Play Fine-Tuning Intro\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"spin-intro\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 SPIN，类比 AlphaGo。'大家还记得 AlphaGo 吗？它最关键的突破就是自我博弈——和自己下棋，每一轮都和上一轮的自己对抗。SPIN 把同样的思想用到了语言模型上。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Chen et al., 2024</div>\n        <h2>SPIN：<span class=\"highlight-cyan\">自我博弈微调</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Self-Play Fine-Tuning Converts Weak LMs to Strong LMs</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">AlphaGo 的启示</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              AlphaGo Zero 不依赖人类棋谱，完全通过<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">自我对弈</strong>从零学到了超越人类的水平。\n            </p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7; margin-top: 8px;\">\n              SPIN 问：语言模型能不能也<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">和自己下棋</strong>？\n            </p>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-orange);\">核心思想</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              当前模型（<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">新版本</strong>）vs 上一轮的自己（<strong style=\"color: var(--text-muted);\">旧版本</strong>）\n            </p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7; margin-top: 8px;\">\n              目标：让新模型的输出与<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">人类数据</strong>不可区分\n            </p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 2: SPIN — Game Theory & Nash Equilibrium\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"spin-theory\"\n         data-notes=\"120s - 讲博弈论框架。用图示说明 min-max 目标函数。'SPIN 的巧妙之处在于它把自我提升形式化成了一个两人零和博弈。主模型尝试让自己和人类数据越来越像，同时区分旧版本的自己和人类。当模型分布等于目标分布时，达到纳什均衡。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">SPIN &middot; 博弈论框架</div>\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 36px);\">两人零和博弈 &amp; <span class=\"highlight-cyan\">纳什均衡</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div style=\"max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 700 300\" width=\"700\" height=\"300\" style=\"max-width: 100%;\">\n            <defs>\n              <marker id=\"arrowCyan\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n              </marker>\n              <marker id=\"arrowOrange\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n              </marker>\n              <marker id=\"arrowGreen\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n              </marker>\n            </defs>\n\n            <!-- Player 1: New Model -->\n            <rect x=\"60\" y=\"80\" width=\"180\" height=\"70\" rx=\"16\" fill=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.1)\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n            <text x=\"150\" y=\"110\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"700\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Player 1</text>\n            <text x=\"150\" y=\"132\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"13\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">新模型 p&#x1D703;</text>\n\n            <!-- Player 2: Old Model -->\n            <rect x=\"460\" y=\"80\" width=\"180\" height=\"70\" rx=\"16\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n            <text x=\"550\" y=\"110\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"700\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Player 2</text>\n            <text x=\"550\" y=\"132\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"13\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">旧模型 p&#x1D703;&#x209C;&#x208A;&#x2081;</text>\n\n            <!-- Human Data (bottom center) -->\n            <rect x=\"260\" y=\"220\" width=\"180\" height=\"60\" rx=\"16\" fill=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.08)\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n            <text x=\"350\" y=\"255\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"700\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">人类数据 p&#x2098;</text>\n\n            <!-- Arrow: New model -> mimic human -->\n            <path d=\"M 170 150 Q 200 200 270 220\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowCyan)\"/>\n            <text x=\"185\" y=\"195\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"11\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">尽可能像</text>\n\n            <!-- Arrow: New model -> distinguish old -->\n            <path d=\"M 240 100 L 460 100\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-dasharray=\"6,3\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowOrange)\"/>\n            <text x=\"350\" y=\"92\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"11\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">区分旧版本</text>\n\n            <!-- Arrow: Old model -> human data (reference) -->\n            <path d=\"M 500 150 Q 470 200 430 220\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.2)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" stroke-dasharray=\"4,3\"/>\n\n            <!-- Nash equilibrium label -->\n            <text x=\"350\" y=\"180\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"13\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\" opacity=\"0.8\">纳什均衡：p&#x1D703; = p&#x2098;</text>\n          </svg>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"callout callout-cyan fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Key Result</div>\n          <p>Zephyr-7B 经 SPIN 微调后，在部分 benchmark 上<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">超越了 GPT-4</strong>。\n          但 SPIN 需要<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">人类数据作为锚点</strong>——这既是质量保证，也是天花板。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 3: Self-Rewarding LM — Intro\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"self-rewarding-intro\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 Self-Rewarding LM。'SPIN 需要人类数据，但如果我们连奖励模型都不需要了呢？模型能不能既当选手又当裁判？听起来很不靠谱，但意外地 work。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Yuan et al., 2024</div>\n        <h2>Self-Rewarding LM：<span class=\"highlight-orange\">自己当裁判</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Self-Rewarding Language Models</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"quote fragment\" style=\"border-left-color: var(--accent-orange);\">\n          \"这就像你自己给自己的论文打分——听起来很不靠谱，但意外地 work。\"\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"callout fragment\" style=\"max-width: 750px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Core Breakthrough</div>\n          <p>不再需要单独训练的奖励模型（Reward Model）。LLM 自己既当<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">选手</strong>（生成回答）又当<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">裁判</strong>（评分评判）。\n          生成能力和评判能力在迭代中<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">共同进化</strong>。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 4: Self-Rewarding LM — Iteration & LLM-as-Judge\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"self-rewarding-detail\"\n         data-notes=\"120s - 讲迭代流程和 LLM-as-Judge。展示迭代曲线。'左边是流程：生成多个回答→自己评分→筛选高分回答→微调→新一轮。右边展示多轮迭代中生成质量和评判质量同时提升的曲线。关键是：RM 和 Policy 共同进化，不像 RLHF 中 RM 是固定的。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Self-Rewarding &middot; 迭代提升</div>\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">LLM-as-a-Judge + <span class=\"highlight-orange\">迭代自进化</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 920px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <!-- Left: Iteration Flow -->\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--accent-orange);\">迭代流程</h3>\n            <div style=\"display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;\">\n              <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\">\n                <span style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(249,115,22,0.15); color: var(--accent-orange); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;\">1</span>\n                <span style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary);\">模型生成多个候选回答</span>\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\">\n                <span style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(6,182,212,0.15); color: var(--accent-cyan); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;\">2</span>\n                <span style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary);\">LLM-as-Judge 自评打分</span>\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\">\n                <span style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: var(--accent-green); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;\">3</span>\n                <span style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary);\">筛选高分回答作训练数据</span>\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\">\n                <span style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); color: var(--accent-purple); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;\">4</span>\n                <span style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary);\">微调模型 &rarr; 新一轮迭代</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n            <div style=\"background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 12px; font-family: var(--font-mono); color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.6;\">\n              Evaluate the response on a scale of 1-10 based on: helpfulness, correctness, coherence...\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Right: Iteration Curve -->\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">RLHF vs Self-Rewarding</h3>\n            <svg viewBox=\"0 0 400 220\" width=\"100%\" style=\"max-width: 400px;\">\n              <!-- Axes -->\n              <line x1=\"50\" y1=\"180\" x2=\"380\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n              <line x1=\"50\" y1=\"180\" x2=\"50\" y2=\"20\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n\n              <!-- Y-axis label -->\n              <text x=\"25\" y=\"100\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"10\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\" transform=\"rotate(-90, 25, 100)\">Quality</text>\n              <!-- X-axis label -->\n              <text x=\"215\" y=\"210\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"10\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iteration</text>\n\n              <!-- RLHF curve (flat ceiling) -->\n              <path d=\"M 70 140 Q 150 100 230 85 Q 300 78 370 75\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-dasharray=\"6,4\"/>\n              <text x=\"375\" y=\"72\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"11\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">RLHF</text>\n              <!-- Ceiling line -->\n              <line x1=\"230\" y1=\"50\" x2=\"380\" y2=\"50\" stroke=\"rgba(100,116,139,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1\" stroke-dasharray=\"4,3\"/>\n              <text x=\"310\" y=\"45\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"rgba(100,116,139,0.5)\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">RM ceiling</text>\n\n              <!-- Self-Rewarding curve (keeps improving) -->\n              <path d=\"M 70 145 Q 150 105 230 75 Q 300 50 370 35\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2.5\"/>\n              <text x=\"375\" y=\"32\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"11\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Rew</text>\n\n              <!-- Iteration ticks -->\n              <text x=\"70\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 0</text>\n              <text x=\"150\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 1</text>\n              <text x=\"230\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 2</text>\n              <text x=\"310\" y=\"195\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"9\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Iter 3</text>\n            </svg>\n\n            <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.5;\">\n              RLHF = 固定 RM &rarr; 天花板<br>\n              Self-Rewarding = RM + Policy 共同进化 &rarr; <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">可能突破天花板</strong>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 5: Constitutional AI — Intro\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"cai-intro\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 Constitutional AI。'Self-Rewarding 有一个风险：模型可能学会给自己放水。Constitutional AI 的思路是：用一组人类写的原则——宪法——来约束自我进化。这是 Anthropic 的核心方法论。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Bai et al., 2022 &middot; Anthropic</div>\n        <h2>Constitutional AI：<span class=\"highlight-purple\">给自我进化加上\"宪法\"</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Harmlessness from AI Feedback</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-purple);\">问题</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              RLHF 需要大量人类标注偏好数据，尤其对<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-red);\">安全性</strong>的标注很难获取——你不能让人类去评价有害内容。\n            </p>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-green);\">解法</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              用一组<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-purple);\">人类定义的原则（Constitution）</strong>代替大量人工标注。模型根据原则<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">自我批评</strong>、<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">自我修订</strong>。\n            </p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 6: Constitutional AI — Two-Stage Pipeline\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"cai-pipeline\"\n         data-notes=\"120s - 讲两阶段流程。用具体例子展示一条宪法原则的完整应用。'第一阶段：模型生成回答→根据宪法原则自我批评→修订回答。第二阶段：用 AI 反馈（RLAIF）替代人类反馈做强化学习。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Constitutional AI &middot; Two Stages</div>\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">两阶段：<span class=\"highlight-purple\">Critique &rarr; RLAIF</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <!-- Stage 1: Supervised -->\n        <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto 20px;\">\n          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px;\">\n            <span style=\"padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); color: var(--accent-purple); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;\">Stage 1</span>\n            <span style=\"font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600;\">Supervised Learning (SL)</span>\n          </div>\n\n          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: stretch; gap: 12px;\">\n            <div style=\"flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">\n              <div style=\"font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-red); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;\">Harmful Prompt</div>\n              \"How to make a bomb?\"\n            </div>\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; color: var(--accent-purple); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n            <div style=\"flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">\n              <div style=\"font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-purple); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;\">Critique (by Principle)</div>\n              \"This violates the principle of not providing dangerous information...\"\n            </div>\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; color: var(--accent-purple); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n            <div style=\"flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">\n              <div style=\"font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-green); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;\">Revision</div>\n              \"I cannot help with that. If you're interested in chemistry...\"\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Stage 2: RLAIF -->\n        <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px;\">\n            <span style=\"padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(6,182,212,0.15); color: var(--accent-cyan); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;\">Stage 2</span>\n            <span style=\"font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600;\">RL from AI Feedback (RLAIF)</span>\n          </div>\n\n          <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; justify-content: center;\">\n            <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n              <div style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.3); font-size: 24px;\">AI</div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px;\">AI 评估<br>两个回答</div>\n            </div>\n            <div style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n            <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n              <div style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(249,115,22,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.3); font-size: 24px;\">RM</div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px;\">AI 训练的<br>奖励模型</div>\n            </div>\n            <div style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan); font-size: 20px;\">&rarr;</div>\n            <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n              <div style=\"display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); font-size: 24px;\">RL</div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px;\">RL 优化<br>Policy</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"callout callout-purple fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin-top: 20px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">RLAIF vs RLHF</div>\n          <p>实验表明，AI 反馈（RLAIF）可以达到<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-purple);\">甚至超越</strong>人类反馈（RLHF）的效果——尤其在安全性维度上。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 7: LLM Debate — Intro\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"debate-intro\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 LLM Debate。'前面的方法都是单个模型的自我提升。但如果让多个模型互相辩论呢？Self-Refine 是自言自语，Debate 是互相挑战——多视角大于单视角。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Du et al., 2023 &middot; Irving et al., 2018</div>\n        <h2>LLM Debate：<span class=\"highlight-cyan\">多模型对抗辩论</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Improving Factuality and Reasoning through Multiagent Debate</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">Self-Refine</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              一个模型<strong style=\"color: var(--text-muted);\">自言自语</strong><br>\n              生成 &rarr; 自评 &rarr; 改进<br>\n              <span style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted);\">单视角，容易陷入盲区</span>\n            </p>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\" style=\"border-color: rgba(6,182,212,0.3); box-shadow: 0 0 30px var(--accent-cyan-glow);\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">LLM Debate</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              多个模型<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">互相挑战</strong><br>\n              生成 &rarr; 辩论 &rarr; 收敛<br>\n              <span style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">多视角 &gt; 单视角</span>\n            </p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div class=\"callout callout-cyan fragment\" style=\"max-width: 750px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">AI Safety Connection</div>\n          <p>Irving et al., 2018 提出 Debate 作为 AI alignment 的机制——<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">对抗式辩论</strong>可以让 AI 系统的决策更透明、更可验证。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 8: LLM Debate — Flow\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"debate-flow\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 讲辩论流程。用流程图展示多轮辩论。'三个模型独立生成答案，互相阅读对方答案，展开辩论，多轮后收敛到更准确的结果。关键发现：Debate 能显著提升事实准确性。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Debate &middot; Flow</div>\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">多轮辩论 <span class=\"highlight-cyan\">收敛到更准确的答案</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"debate-flow stagger\">\n          <div class=\"debate-round\">\n            <div class=\"debate-round-label\">Round 0</div>\n            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n              <strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">独立生成：</strong>\n              模型 A 回答 \"42\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; 模型 B 回答 \"38\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; 模型 C 回答 \"42\"\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"debate-vs\">VS</div>\n\n          <div class=\"debate-round\">\n            <div class=\"debate-round-label\">Round 1</div>\n            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n              <strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">互相质疑：</strong>\n              A: \"42 基于 X 推理\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; B: \"38 的依据是 Y，X 的前提有误\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; C 支持 A\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"debate-vs\">VS</div>\n\n          <div class=\"debate-round\">\n            <div class=\"debate-round-label\">Round 2</div>\n            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n              <strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">修正立场：</strong>\n              A 坚持并补充证据 &nbsp;|&nbsp; B 承认 X 的合理性，修正为 \"41\" &nbsp;|&nbsp; C 补充细节\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"debate-vs\" style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">&Darr;</div>\n\n          <div class=\"debate-round\" style=\"border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.3); background: rgba(34,197,94,0.04);\">\n            <div class=\"debate-round-label\" style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">Converge</div>\n            <div class=\"debate-round-content\">\n              <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">收敛：</strong>\n              通过多轮辩论，模型们收敛到更准确的答案，事实准确性显著提升\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 9: FunSearch — Intro\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"funsearch-intro\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 引出 FunSearch，不剧透具体成果。'前面所有的方法都是在语言空间里打转。FunSearch 做了一件更激进的事：让 LLM 当进化算法的变异算子，去搜索程序。它到底发现了什么？先来猜一猜。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Romera-Paredes et al., 2024 &middot; DeepMind</div>\n        <h2>FunSearch：<span class=\"highlight-green\">LLM 作为进化引擎</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Mathematical Discoveries from Program Search with Large Language Models</p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"quote fragment\" style=\"border-left-color: var(--accent-green);\">\n          \"搜索的不是'答案'，而是<strong>生成答案的程序</strong>——可验证性是关键。\"\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"callout callout-green fragment\" style=\"max-width: 750px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Key Insight</div>\n          <p>LLM 不只是被进化的对象，它本身就是进化过程中的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">\"变异引擎\"</strong>。\n          生成新程序 &rarr; 自动评估 &rarr; 保留最优 &rarr; 进化迭代。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 10: Quiz — FunSearch (moved before results)\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"quiz\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 互动 Quiz，放在成果揭晓之前。'FunSearch 让 LLM 去搜索程序，那它到底做出了什么？来猜猜看！'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">互动 Quiz</div>\n        <h2>FunSearch 到底发现了什么？<span class=\"highlight-green\">猜猜看！</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"quiz-options\" id=\"quizOptions\">\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">A</span>\n              <span>新的排序算法</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"correct\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">B</span>\n              <span>Cap set 问题的新下界</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">C</span>\n              <span>新的蛋白质结构</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">D</span>\n              <span>更高效的矩阵乘法</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div id=\"quizResult\" class=\"callout callout-green\" style=\"max-width: 700px; display: none;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Correct! B</div>\n          <p>FunSearch 发现了 cap set 问题在更大维度上的新下界，以及 bin packing 的新启发式算法——这些都是<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">超越人类已知最优解</strong>的成果。接下来看它是怎么做到的。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 11: FunSearch — Architecture + Results\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"funsearch-arch\"\n         data-notes=\"120s - 讲 FunSearch 完整架构 + 揭晓成果。'刚才大家猜了 FunSearch 的成果，现在来看它是怎么做到的。左边是程序数据库，中间是 LLM 变异，右边是自动评估器。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">FunSearch &middot; Architecture</div>\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">进化架构：<span class=\"highlight-green\">Program DB + LLM + Evaluator</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div style=\"max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 800 280\" width=\"800\" height=\"280\" style=\"max-width: 100%;\">\n            <defs>\n              <marker id=\"arrowGreenSvg\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n              </marker>\n              <marker id=\"arrowGreenRev\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"0\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                <polygon points=\"8 0, 0 3, 8 6\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n              </marker>\n            </defs>\n\n            <!-- Program Database -->\n            <rect x=\"40\" y=\"80\" width=\"200\" height=\"120\" rx=\"16\" fill=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.08)\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n            <text x=\"140\" y=\"120\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"16\" font-weight=\"700\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Programs Database</text>\n            <text x=\"140\" y=\"145\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">保存历史上的优秀程序</text>\n            <text x=\"140\" y=\"165\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">+ 评分 + 多样性信息</text>\n\n            <!-- LLM Mutation -->\n            <rect x=\"300\" y=\"80\" width=\"200\" height=\"120\" rx=\"16\" fill=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.08)\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n            <text x=\"400\" y=\"120\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"16\" font-weight=\"700\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">LLM Mutation</text>\n            <text x=\"400\" y=\"145\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">基于已有程序</text>\n            <text x=\"400\" y=\"165\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">生成新变体</text>\n\n            <!-- Evaluator -->\n            <rect x=\"560\" y=\"80\" width=\"200\" height=\"120\" rx=\"16\" fill=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.08)\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n            <text x=\"660\" y=\"120\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"16\" font-weight=\"700\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Auto Evaluator</text>\n            <text x=\"660\" y=\"145\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">自动验证 + 评分</text>\n            <text x=\"660\" y=\"165\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">决定是否保留</text>\n\n            <!-- Arrows: DB -> LLM -->\n            <path d=\"M 240 140 L 300 140\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowGreenSvg)\"/>\n\n            <!-- Arrows: LLM -> Evaluator -->\n            <path d=\"M 500 140 L 560 140\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowGreenSvg)\"/>\n\n            <!-- Arrow: Evaluator -> DB (feedback loop) -->\n            <path d=\"M 660 200 Q 660 260 400 260 Q 140 260 140 200\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-dasharray=\"8,4\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowGreenSvg)\"/>\n            <text x=\"400\" y=\"275\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\" font-weight=\"600\">Evolution Loop</text>\n          </svg>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2 fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin: 16px auto 0; gap: 16px;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card\" style=\"padding: 18px 20px;\">\n            <div style=\"font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-green); margin-bottom: 6px;\">Cap Set Problem</div>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">发现了 cap set 问题的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">新下界</strong>，超越人类已知最优解</p>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"glass-card\" style=\"padding: 18px 20px;\">\n            <div style=\"font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-cyan); margin-bottom: 6px;\">Bin Packing</div>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;\">发现了 bin packing 的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">新启发式算法</strong></p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 11: EvoPrompt & OpenELM\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"evoprompt-openelm\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 简要讲 EvoPrompt 和 OpenELM。'FunSearch 证明了 LLM + 进化算法的威力。EvoPrompt 和 OpenELM 进一步拓展了这个方向。EvoPrompt 用遗传算法优化 prompt，OpenELM 用 MAP-Elites 维护多样性。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">进化算法 &times; LLM</div>\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);\">EvoPrompt &amp; OpenELM</h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px;\">进化思想在 LLM 中的更多应用</p>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 880px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <div style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-orange); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 10px;\">Guo et al., 2023</div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">EvoPrompt</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              用<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">遗传算法 / 差分进化</strong>优化 prompt\n            </p>\n            <div style=\"margin-top: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;\">\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">1.</span> 初始 prompt 种群\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">2.</span> 交叉 + 变异生成新 prompt\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">3.</span> 评估 &rarr; 选择 &rarr; 迭代\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left fragment\">\n            <div style=\"font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent-cyan); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 10px;\">Lehman et al., 2024</div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">OpenELM</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              用<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">MAP-Elites</strong> 等质量多样性算法维护<strong>多样化</strong>的解群体\n            </p>\n            <div style=\"margin-top: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;\">\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">1.</span> 维护多个行为维度的精英\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">2.</span> LLM 作为变异算子\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n                <span style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">3.</span> 同时优化质量 + 多样性\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"callout callout-green fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin-top: 20px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Core Insight</div>\n          <p>LLM 不只是被进化的对象，它本身就是进化过程中的<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">\"变异引擎\"</strong>——比随机变异更智能、更有方向性。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 12: Quiz — FunSearch\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"quiz\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 互动 Quiz。'来个小测验！以下哪个是 FunSearch 真正发现的？' 点击正确答案后高亮。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">互动 Quiz</div>\n        <h2>以下哪个是 FunSearch <span class=\"highlight-green\">真正发现</span>的？</h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"quiz-options\" id=\"quizOptions\">\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">A</span>\n              <span>新的排序算法</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"correct\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">B</span>\n              <span>Cap set 问题的新下界</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">C</span>\n              <span>新的蛋白质结构</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">\n            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">\n              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">D</span>\n              <span>更高效的矩阵乘法</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div id=\"quizResult\" class=\"callout callout-green\" style=\"max-width: 700px; display: none;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Correct! B</div>\n          <p>FunSearch 发现了 cap set 问题在更大维度上的新下界，以及 bin packing 的新启发式算法——这些都是<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">超越人类已知最优解</strong>的成果。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 13: Part C Summary — Panorama Map\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"part-c-summary\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 回顾全景图，高亮 Part C 涵盖的区域。'回到我们的全景图。Part C 涵盖了中间和右边的两个分支：自我博弈与 AI 反馈（SPIN、Self-Rewarding、Constitutional AI、Debate），以及自我进化（FunSearch、EvoPrompt、OpenELM）。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Part C 回顾</div>\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 36px);\">方法全景图 <span class=\"highlight-cyan\">— 你在这里</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"panorama-wrapper\">\n          <div class=\"panorama-branches\">\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-orange dim\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title\">Self-Improving</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">自我提升</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>Self-Instruct</li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>STaR / V-STaR</li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>Self-Refine</li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>ReST</li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-cyan lit\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title\">Self-Play &amp; AI Feedback</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">自我博弈 &amp; AI 反馈</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>SPIN</li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>Self-Rewarding LM</li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>Constitutional AI</li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span>LLM Debate</li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n\n            <div =====================================================\n         Slide 14: Transition to Part D\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"transition-to-d\"\n         data-notes=\"30s - 过渡。'听到这里，你可能会觉得 Self-Improvement 是一个银弹——模型自己就能越变越强。但事情真的这么美好吗？自我提升有没有天花板？有什么陷阱？交棒给成员 D。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"stagger\" style=\"display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 36px;\">\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(6,182,212,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--accent-cyan); opacity: 0.6; text-decoration: line-through;\">SPIN &#10003;</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(249,115,22,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--accent-orange); opacity: 0.6; text-decoration: line-through;\">Self-Rewarding &#10003;</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--accent-purple); opacity: 0.6; text-decoration: line-through;\">Constitutional AI &#10003;</span>\n          <span style=\"padding: 10px 22px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--accent-green); opacity: 0.6; text-decoration: line-through;\">FunSearch &#10003;</span>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"quote fragment\" style=\"border-left-color: var(--accent-red);\">\n          \"听到这里，你可能会觉得 Self-Improvement 是一个银弹——模型自己就能越变越强。<br>\n          但事情真的这么美好吗？自我提升有没有天花板？有什么陷阱？\"\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <p class=\"fragment\" style=\"font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-secondary);\">\n          交棒给成员 D &rarr;\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n  </div><!-- end .presentation -->\n\n  <!-- =====================================================\n       Navigation UI\n       ===================================================== -->\n  <div class=\"progress-track\">\n    <div class=\"progress-fill\" id=\"progressFill\"></div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"nav-bar\">\n    <span class=\"nav-hint\"><kbd>&larr;</kbd> <kbd>&rarr;</kbd> navigate &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; <kbd>S</kbd> notes &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; <kbd>F</kbd> fullscreen</span>\n    <span class=\"slide-counter\" id=\"slideCounter\">1 / 15</span>\n  </div>\n\n  <!-- Speaker Notes Overlay -->\n  <div class=\"speaker-notes\" id=\"speakerNotes\"></div>\n\n  <!-- =====================================================\n       JavaScript\n       ===================================================== -->\n  <script>\n    (function() {\n      'use strict';\n\n      // ========== Slide Navigation ==========\n      const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');\n      const totalSlides = slides.length;\n      let currentSlide = 0;\n      let isAnimating = false;\n      let notesVisible = false;\n\n      function getFragments(slideEl) {\n        return Array.from(slideEl.querySelectorAll('.fragment:not(.visible)'));\n      }\n\n      function getAllFragments(slideEl) {\n        return Array.from(slideEl.querySelectorAll('.fragment'));\n      }\n\n      function updateUI() {\n        document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width =\n          ((currentSlide + 1) / totalSlides * 100) + '%';\n        document.getElementById('slideCounter').textContent =\n          (currentSlide + 1) + ' / ' + totalSlides;\n\n        // Update speaker notes\n        const notes = slides[currentSlide].getAttribute('data-notes') || '';\n        const notesEl = document.getElementById('speakerNotes');\n        notesEl.innerHTML = notes;\n      }\n\n      function goToSlide(index) {\n        if (index < 0 || index >= totalSlides || index === currentSlide || isAnimating) return;\n        isAnimating = true;\n\n        const direction = index > currentSlide ? 1 : -1;\n        const prevSlide = slides[currentSlide];\n        const nextSlide = slides[index];\n\n        // Reset fragments on next slide\n        getAllFragments(nextSlide).forEach(f => f.classList.remove('visible'));\n\n        prevSlide.classList.remove('active');\n        if (direction > 0) prevSlide.classList.add('exit-left');\n        prevSlide.style.transform = direction > 0\n          ? 'translateX(-40px) scale(0.98)'\n          : 'translateX(40px) scale(0.98)';\n\n        nextSlide.style.transform = direction > 0\n          ? 'translateX(40px) scale(0.98)'\n          : 'translateX(-40px) scale(0.98)';\n        nextSlide.classList.add('active');\n\n        requestAnimationFrame(() => {\n          nextSlide.style.transform = '';\n        });\n\n        currentSlide = index;\n        updateUI();\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          prevSlide.classList.remove('exit-left');\n          prevSlide.style.transform = '';\n          isAnimating = false;\n        }, 500);\n      }\n\n      function nextStep() {\n        const hiddenFragments = getFragments(slides[currentSlide]);\n        if (hiddenFragments.length > 0) {\n          hiddenFragments[0].classList.add('visible');\n        } else {\n          goToSlide(currentSlide + 1);\n        }\n      }\n\n      function prevStep() {\n        const visibleFragments = getAllFragments(slides[currentSlide])\n          .filter(f => f.classList.contains('visible'));\n        if (visibleFragments.length > 0) {\n          visibleFragments[visibleFragments.length - 1].classList.remove('visible');\n        } else {\n          goToSlide(currentSlide - 1);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Keyboard controls\n      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {\n        switch(e.key) {\n          case 'ArrowRight':\n          case ' ':\n          case 'PageDown':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            nextStep();\n            break;\n          case 'ArrowLeft':\n          case 'PageUp':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            prevStep();\n            break;\n          case 'Home':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            goToSlide(0);\n            break;\n          case 'End':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            goToSlide(totalSlides - 1);\n            break;\n          case 's':\n          case 'S':\n            notesVisible = !notesVisible;\n            document.getElementById('speakerNotes').classList.toggle('show', notesVisible);\n            break;\n          case 'f':\n          case 'F':\n            if (!document.fullscreenElement) {\n              document.documentElement.requestFullscreen().catch(() => {});\n            } else {\n              document.exitFullscreen().catch(() => {});\n            }\n            break;\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Click navigation\n      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n        if (e.target.closest('button, a, input, .quiz-option')) return;\n        if (e.clientX < window.innerWidth * 0.3) {\n          prevStep();\n        } else {\n          nextStep();\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Touch support\n      let touchStartX = 0;\n      document.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n        touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      document.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n        const diff = touchStartX - e.changedTouches[0].screenX;\n        if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) {\n          if (diff > 0) nextStep();\n          else prevStep();\n        }\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      // ========== Quiz Logic ==========\n      window.handleQuiz = function(el) {\n        const options = document.querySelectorAll('.quiz-option');\n        const result = document.getElementById('quizResult');\n        const answer = el.getAttribute('data-answer');\n\n        options.forEach(opt => {\n          opt.style.pointerEvents = 'none';\n          if (opt.getAttribute('data-answer') === 'correct') {\n            opt.classList.add('correct');\n          } else if (opt === el && answer === 'wrong') {\n            opt.classList.add('wrong');\n          }\n        });\n\n        result.style.display = 'block';\n      };\n\n      // ========== Init ==========\n      updateUI();\n    })();\n  </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1332,"oldLines":51,"newStart":1332,"newLines":6,"lines":["     </div>"," ","     <!-- =====================================================","-         Slide 12: Quiz — FunSearch","-         ===================================================== -->","-    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"quiz\"","-         data-notes=\"60s - 互动 Quiz。'来个小测验！以下哪个是 FunSearch 真正发现的？' 点击正确答案后高亮。\">","-      <div class=\"slide-content\">","-        <div class=\"tag\">互动 Quiz</div>","-        <h2>以下哪个是 FunSearch <span class=\"highlight-green\">真正发现</span>的？</h2>","-        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>","-","-        <div class=\"quiz-options\" id=\"quizOptions\">","-          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">","-            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">","-              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">A</span>","-              <span>新的排序算法</span>","-            </div>","-          </div>","-          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"correct\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">","-            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">","-              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">B</span>","-              <span>Cap set 问题的新下界</span>","-            </div>","-          </div>","-          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">","-            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">","-              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">C</span>","-              <span>新的蛋白质结构</span>","-            </div>","-          </div>","-          <div class=\"quiz-option\" data-answer=\"wrong\" onclick=\"handleQuiz(this)\">","-            <div style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\">","-              <span class=\"quiz-option-label\">D</span>","-              <span>更高效的矩阵乘法</span>","-            </div>","-          </div>","-        </div>","-","-        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>","-        <div id=\"quizResult\" class=\"callout callout-green\" style=\"max-width: 700px; display: none;\">","-          <div class=\"callout-label\">Correct! B</div>","-          <p>FunSearch 发现了 cap set 问题在更大维度上的新下界，以及 bin packing 的新启发式算法——这些都是<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-green);\">超越人类已知最优解</strong>的成果。</p>","-        </div>","-      </div>","-    </div>","-","-    <!-- =====================================================","          Slide 13: Part C Summary — Panorama Map","          ===================================================== -->","     <div class=\"slide\" id=\"part-c-summary\""]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"7a597cc5-c5ad-4e96-a6a1-2b870b4ae290","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/nginxson/projects/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"9adea2f7-8780-47d0-abfd-c07245d3311f","version":"unknown","gitBranch":"main","slug":"composed-foraging-penguin"}
